Name: Andaman Medical
Description:
Since 2013, Andaman Medical has been transforming regulatory challenges into market opportunities across Southeast Asia. Our comprehensive solutions ensure seamless market access for medical device and IVD companies worldwide.

Medical Device & IVDs Registration: Our expert in-house team streamlines complex regulatory requirements through a proven fast-track process. We manage all aspects from document preparation to final approval, significantly reducing time-to-market while maintaining complete compliance.

Authorized Representative Services: As your independent authorized representative, we serve as your direct liaison with regulatory authorities. Our independence offers unique flexibility in distributor relationships, ensuring you maintain full control of your licenses while we protect your interests throughout the regulatory process.

Import Solutions: We navigate the intricate customs regulations in the Philippines, Indonesia, and Thailand. As license holders, we ensure efficient customs clearance and timely delivery, leveraging our deep understanding of regional trade requirements to prevent delays.

Post-Market Compliance Management: Our vigilant team handles all aspects of post-market surveillance, including incident reporting, Field Safety Corrective Actions (FSCAs), and recalls. We continuously monitor regulatory changes and manage reporting obligations, keeping you fully compliant while you focus on business growth.

With eight strategic offices across Southeast Asia and additional coverage in East Asia through Nord Pacific Medical, we provide comprehensive regional support. Partner with Andaman Medical to transform regulatory complexity into your competitive advantage in Asia's dynamic medical device market.

Name: AMT Pte. Ltd.
Description:
At AMT, our goal is to be your strategic contract manufacturing partner to help you deliver more innovative and effective solutions. 

We apply over 30 years of experience delivering quality and compliant products that help organizations efficiently prototype and/or commercialize medical devices to meet today’s market demands. Given our team’s experience adhering to the strict standards of IP protection as well as regulatory requirements stipulated by US FDA and European EMA, we can help our customers worry less about compliance and more about their areas of expertise. Furthermore, thanks to our relationship with suppliers across Asia, combined with a streamlined supply chain process, our customers also benefit from a holistic and efficient manufacturing process that ensures value, protects their business interests, and provides peace of mind.

Through our advanced core capabilities in Metal / Ceramic Injection Molding technologies, we help bring designs to life for market leaders in the Medical, Industrial, Automotive, and Electronics industries. By vertically integrating our Class 10,000 clean room plastic injection molding and tooling capabilities, it enables us to offer a broad range of medical OEM solutions. 

We do business across 30 countries and are made up of 350 passionate employees dedicated to advancing manufacturing possibilities to help you and your organization bring ideas to life.

Certifications
- ISO 9001
- ISO 13485
- IATF 16949 

Capabilities
- 3D metal printing services
- Tooling fabrication services
- Metal Injection Molding (MIM)
- Ceramic Injection Molding (CIM)
- Cooper Injection Molding 
- Class 100K Cleanroom Plastics Injection Molding
- Class 100K Cleanroom Assembly Services

Achievements
- 15 inventions 
- 29 patents in 12 countries
- 7 grand prizes and 4 distinction awards for outstanding application of powder metallurgy technology

Name: FLEXXON
Description:
We are a next-generation storage device manufacturer, specializing in hardware-based cybersecurity solutions and industrial NAND flash storage devices. We specialize in standard or customized products and solutions to serve a broad spectrum of industries with a critical focus on Cybersecurity, Industrial, Medical, and Automotive (C.I.M.A) applications.

Founded in 2007 and headquartered in Singapore, Flexxon is a global company with a presence in Asia-Pacific, Europe, North America, and the Middle East. We are proudly backed by Heliconia Capital Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Temasek Holdings. 

Rooted in our strong pedigree as a leading industrial NAND flash storage solutions provider, we are committed to protecting the fundamental rights of all digital citizens through constant innovation to address the evolving cybersecurity needs of today. We diversified our product offerings and introduced the X-PHY brand, the world’s first AI-embedded firmware-based cybersecurity solution.

Name: Electronics & Engineering Pte Ltd
Description: Established in 1951, Electronics & Engineering Pte Ltd is a leading Specialist Contractor, Consultant and Systems Integrator alongside being a Distributor and Supplier of a vast array of reputable audio-visual equipment in Singapore and the Region.

Name: WaveScan
Description:
WaveScan is an A*STAR spin-off company specializing in the R&D of disruptive beamforming electromagnetics based smart sensor systems and advanced AI algorithms. Our proprietary technology builds upon nearly a decade-long R&D on microwave & millimeter-wave wireless sensors and is capable of high-resolution 4D sensing for non-destructive testing (NDT) applications. We provide an end-to-end AI-enabled asset inspection solution, addressing the specific needs of the built environment sector.

Smart sensor systems, integrable with autonomous vehicles, along with a centralized AI-enabled analytics solution, are the future of active inspection systems for sustaining resilient infrastructure. At WaveScan, we envision safer, productive & livable cities by creating a predictive maintenance ecosystem through data-driven standardization of inspection processes. We are looking for global partners & early-adopters to join us in our mission of disrupting the practices of how infrastructure & facilities are planned, built & managed today.

Name: Vela Diagnostics
Description: Vela Diagnostics is a worldwide provider of integrated molecular diagnostics workflows that address individual testing needs. Established in 2011 with its global headquarters in Singapore, Vela Diagnostics provides innovative test and data reporting solutions for Real-Time PCR and Next-Generation Sequencing. Integrating both PCR and NGS solutions to test for infectious diseases and oncologic targets increases flexibility and efficiency of the workflow and enables laboratories to overcome complex diagnostic challenges. Reliable and multi-purpose instruments help reduce cost for optimal efficiency across laboratories of all sizes. With scalability and open-channel capabilities, laboratories also benefit from the flexibility and versatility of the systems available. For more information, please visit www.veladx.com.

Name: Macnica Cytech Pte Ltd
Description:
Macnica Cytech is one of the leading technology oriented value-added distributors of electronic components in Hong Kong, China, ASEAN countries and India region today. 

Macnica Cytech Pte Ltd was established in 2009 to lead the expansion into ASEAN countries and India region, with Singapore as our regional headquarter. 

Our main headquarter is in Hong Kong, and we have more than 30 regional offices, spread across China and Pan-Asia regions, including Beijing, Shenzhen, Shanghai, Singapore, Malaysia and India. 

With almost 1300 employees, Macnica Cytech specializes in demand creation, as well as meeting global supply. Macnica Cytech's portfolio of services includes technical and logistic support, buffer stocks and total solutions.

Name: WIN SOURCE
Description:
WIN SOURCE is meticulously amassing electronic components, through refined procedures, first-rate services, diverse portfolios, intellectual investments, and expanding business globally.

It caters to regular parts costdown needs, and obsolescence management, and focusing on customer satisfaction, offers a seamless, customized approach to optimize your supply chain, and experience supply chain solutions precisely designed to align with your unique needs, ensuring efficiency, flexibility, and cost-effectiveness.

Web：win-source.net | win-source.group
Email：service@win-source.net
Global Branches ：United States | Germany | Canada | Italy | Singapore | India | Japan | United Kingdom | South Korea | Hong Kong | Mainland China | Philippines

Name: Wellesta
Description:
Wellesta Holdings Pte Ltd is a company that is headquartered in Singapore, set up to support companies in the Healthcare sector to provide marketing and commercial support in South East Asia, India & Europe and with partners in MENA. It will act as a representative for companies that are not present in this geography and would like to sell/ market their products in the region.

We are a team of well qualified, experienced and proven industry leaders with in-depth knowledge in every market we operate in. We have experienced marketing and promotion associates which will provide value added partnerships for principals and healthcare professionals. 

Wellesta aims to provide wider range, high quality and right priced healthcare solutions to a broader population base in the countries we serve. Our strategy is to be a leading & focused Healthcare company powered by productive partnerships with other Healthcare companies.

Name: ClinActis
Description:
ClinActis is a leading full-service contract research organization (CRO) providing clinical trial services in the Asia Pacific region to pharmaceutical, medical device, medical nutrition, and biotech companies. Established in 2009 and headquartered in Singapore, our management and operational teams have more than 50 cumulative years of experience in clinical research.

We take pride in being one of the key players in clinical trials in Asia. Our experienced team of professionals has extensive experience working on global clinical trials, as well as a deep understanding of the local cultures, regulations, and healthcare systems in the APAC region. This enables us to deliver customized clinical trial solutions that address the unique needs of our clients and the specific requirements of each country in the region.

As a full-service CRO, we offer a comprehensive range of services and solutions, including study design, protocol development, site selection, project management, data management, biostatistics, medical writing, and regulatory affairs. Our goal is to provide our clients with a seamless and efficient clinical trial experience in Asia Pacific, from start to finish.

At ClinActis, we are dedicated to helping our clients bring safe and effective drugs and interventions to the market. Contact us today to learn more about how we can support your clinical research needs in the Asia Pacific region.

Name: COIM Asia Pacific Pte Ltd
Description: COIM Asia Pacific Pte Ltd (COIM AP) is a fully owned subsidiary of COIM S.P.A and was incorporated in 1997. The manufacturing facility is located at 10 Seraya Place, Jurong Island. It produces a variety of polyurethane and other specialty chemical products such as Diexter, Isoexter, Urexter, Imuthane and Novacote products using a number of raw materials and other substances.

Name: HELM ASIA
Description:
HELM is one of the world’s largest independent chemicals marketing companies established in Hamburg in the year 1900. The Company secures access to the world’s key markets through its specific regional knowledge and over 100 branches, sales offices and participations in over 30 countries. As a multifunctional marketing organization, HELM is active in the chemicals industry (Feedstocks and Derivatives), in the crop protection industry, pharmaceuticals and in the fertilizer industry. Our services range from international marketing, distribution, logistics, production and project development to scientific and technical services. 

Our Vision: 	As a family-owned, global company we will be a leading 
                        partner of choice for the chemicals, life science and 
                        agricultural industries.

Our Mission: 	We have leading expertise in marketing, distribution, logistics 
                        and product & project development.
                        For selected products we invest into production joint ventures.
                        Our global team is committed, reliable and strong in 
                        implementing creative solutions.
                        We have a long-term commitment to our business partners 
                        and our employees.
                        We create sustainable values to all our stakeholders.
                        Fairness & social responsibility as well as compliance & 
                        sustainability are our fundamentals.

Helm Asia, with our regional head office in Singapore, together with our country offices in China (Shanghai, Tianjin, Chengdu & Guangzhou), Japan, India, South Korea (Seoul & Busan) and Thailand supports our business partners in Asia to extend their  regional and global reach leveraging on our global network.  We have an ambitious plan to expand our business and operations in Asia.

Our website: 
https://www.helmag.com/
https://www.helmasia.com/

Name: Infobit
Description:
INFOBIT is a leading manufacturer of professional audio video (ProAV) transmission/switching, wireless presentation systems and BYOD/BYOM, video wall controllers, Matrix Switchers, Conference Camera, Microphone and Speakerphone, Extenders, Central Control, Active Optical Cables, Cooper Cables. INFOBIT’s mission is to offer the most innovative and cost-effective solutions for our customers who are looking for agile collaboration technologies to transform the way people connect and communicate.

Our main markets are ProAV, Control Rooms, Conference, Meeting rooms, hospitality, and Digital signage.

Name: Cordlife Singapore
Description:
Listed on the Main Board of the Singapore Exchange ("SGX"), Cordlife Group Limited ("Cordlife", and together with its subsidiaries, the "Group") is presently a service provider of umbilical cord blood and cord lining banking. The first cord blood bank to be set up in Singapore (May 2001) and amongst the first in Asia, Cordlife Group Limited has more than 16 years of cord blood banking experience as well as a published track record of cord blood transplants.

The Group currently owns and operates full processing and cryopreservation storage facilities across Asia, namely in Singapore, Hong Kong, India, Indonesia, Malaysia and the Philippines. Cordlife's processing and storage facilities in Singapore, Hong Kong and India are AABB accredited and by late 2015, the Singapore facility achieved accreditation from FACT-Netcord, placing the Group as one of the six international private cord blood banks that hold accreditations by two world-class standards. Besides being the first private cord blood bank in Southeast Asia to enjoy the dual-accreditation status, the Group also extends its products and services to families in the region through its associate in Thailand and sub-licensing partner in China.

*Conditional accreditation status for Cordlife’s facility in Singapore

Name: Wavelength Opto-Electronic
Description:
Wavelength Opto-Electronic (S) Pte Ltd was set up in 2011 with our core business in optical design and manufacturing laser optics, infrared optics, optical modules, complex system customization and optics rapid prototyping. 

We manufacture industrial laser machine process heads for the international laser application market. We also collaborate in extensive research and development, developing small-to-large scale customized complex optical systems and providing QA/QC metrology solutions for customers in the international market and Singapore.

Name: Juniper Biologics
Description:
The story of Juniper Biologics  is birthed on the basic premise that access to healthcare is a birthright. We are a science-led healthcare company focused on delivering novel therapies to improve the health and quality of life of patients everywhere by building a growing presence in oncology, rare/orphan diseases and gene therapy.
 
Juniper Biologics was founded on a vision to create a pharmaceutical business that is both agile and innovative. This includes a commitment to providing treatments for unmet needs focused on specialist therapy areas in which we can make the most difference.

Our purpose is clear: to do all that we can to change the treatment landscape and address the unmet medical needs of patients, and to do it as quickly as possible. Through bold and transformative science, we’re creating possibilities that have the potential to become the next generation of life-changing medicines.

This is just the beginning of our story… and we are just getting started.

Name: Mecomb Singapore
Description:
Mecomb Singapore Limited is a trading arm of the Sime Darby Industrial Group. Established in 1953, the company was originally known as Mechanical and Combustion Engineering Company Limited. Since its inception, the company has strived to meet demands of the local industry by supplying state-of-the-art engineering products and services from countries all over the world and backing organizations up with strong local technical support. With strong partnership with our principals, a dedicated team of specialists and a well-established customer base, Mecomb is ever ready to partner with your organization to seize new opportunities and open new doors to the ever fast-changing competitive industry.

•	Telecommunication systems

Name: A*STAR Institute of Molecular and Cell Biology (A*STAR IMCB)
Description: The Institute of Molecular and Cell Biology (IMCB) is a premier research institute at A*STAR whose mission is to harness biology for transformational bio-therapeutics and diagnostics. With a strong emphasis on collaboration with stakeholders across the ecosystem in Singapore, IMCB aims to achieve scientific excellence and continues to nurture the next generation of scientists in order to create growth and enhance lives.

Name: Lintec & Linnhoff
Description: Our legacy commenced in 1919 when our founder Eduard Linnhoff manufactured our first asphalt equipment in Berlin. Today our business had expanded far beyond to 29 countries around the world. With long term experiences, we combine tradition with new technologies to deliver purpose-built solutions that meet and support industry standards for asphalt and concrete industries.

Name: Entobel
Description:
Entobel is converting low value organic substrate into high quality products thanks to insects. 

Our main current products are sustainable animal feed (proteins and oils) and organic fertilizer. 

Since 2013, Entobel is running a commercial scale production site in Vietnam and exporting products worldwide. 

Entobel complies with highest standards in the industry (ISO 22000), only use tracable feedstocks and is FDA approved. 

Entobel is looking for strong partners to join for its expansion plans. Don't hesitate to contact us for more information.

Name: SciGen Pte. Ltd.
Description:
SciGen is a rapidly growing biopharmaceutical company that markets and commercializes innovative and affordable healthcare products worldwide. We leverage our commercialization and networking capabilities to in-licenses and distribute branded pharmaceutical products and medical devices to treat endocrinological and oncological diseases, and continuously fill and improve our pipeline and product portfolio. Founded in the Asian Innovation Capital, Singapore in 1988, we currently have operations in Singapore, South Korea, Australia, China, Philippines and present commercially in all 6 continents. With the exceptional commercialization capabilities, regulatory expertise as well as international management experiences, and strategic partnerships built with industry and academic institutes, we strive to deliver hope and make a real and lasting difference to patients and their families.

Who are we?
- We believe in delivering solutions that matter to the people of today and innovating for the people of tomorrow.
- To us, it is more than a business - it is a mission.

What do we do?
- We combine a specialty pharmaceutical business with a leading biologics biotechnology engine.
- We partner to bring the best drugs we can find to the patients who need it most.

How do we do it?
- Our efforts aim to deliver better patient outcomes through better science.
- We understand that humility and service matter as it is not about us, it is about making patients’ lives better.

Name: Varian Asia Pacific, Japan & India
Description:
At Varian, a Siemens Healthineers company, we envision a world without fear of cancer. 

For more than 70 years, we have developed, built and delivered innovative cancer care technologies and solutions for our clinical partners around the globe to help them treat millions of patients each year. With an Intelligent Cancer Care approach, we are harnessing advanced technologies like artificial intelligence, machine learning and data analytics to enhance cancer treatment and expand access to care. Our 10,000 employees across 70 locations keep the patient and our clinical partners at the center of our thinking as we power new victories in cancer care. Because, for cancer patients everywhere, their fight is our fight. For more information, visit http://www.varian.com.

Name: Jungheinrich Asia-Pacific
Description:
The regional headquarter for Jungheinrich AG in APAC, the APAC regional headquarters is like the central hub of our global company's operations in this vast and dynamic part of the world. Its main gig? Well, it's all about coordination and making things happen smoothly.

First up, they're the go-to folks for strategy. They brainstorm, plan, and decide how the company's goals align with the unique needs and opportunities in APAC. They're the masterminds behind the scenes.

Then, they're the problem solvers. Whether it's navigating diverse markets, regulations, or cultural nuances, they've got it covered. It's their job to adapt and find ways to keep the company on track.

They're also in charge of keeping the company's regional offices in sync. Think of them as the bridge between the HQ back home and all the different APAC branches. Communication is key, and they make sure everyone's on the same page.

Money matters, too. Managing budgets, financial planning, and reporting – they handle the dollars and cents to make sure things stay financially sound.

And don't forget about talent. They play a role in HR, ensuring the right people are in the right places, with the right skills.

Lastly, they're all about growth. Expanding market share, exploring new opportunities, and driving success – they're the growth enthusiasts of the company.

In a nutshell, the APAC regional headquarters is like the conductor of a complex orchestra, making sure all the parts harmonize and the performance is a hit in this diverse and dynamic region.

Name: KSB Asia South & Pacific
Description:
ABOUT KSB SINGAPORE (ASIA PACIFIC) PTE LTD

KSB Singapore was established in 1988 as a regional center for distribution and sales of KSB manufactured products in Singapore and Asia South Region. 


ABOUT KSB GROUP

KSB is one of the world’s leading suppliers of pumps, valves and related systems.

KSB combines innovative technology and excellent service to provide intelligent solutions. This approach means that KSB employees are close to customers on all continents, providing them with pumps, valves and systems for almost all applications involving the transportation of liquids. A comprehensive range of services rounds off this customer-focused portfolio.

KSB has been growing continuously since it was founded in 1871. Today the Group has a presence on all continents with its own sales and marketing companies, manufacturing facilities and service operations. More than 15,600 employees generate annual consolidated sales revenue of two billion euros. 


KSB WORLDWIDE

With production plants, sales offices and agents in more than 100 countries, KSB is close to its customers throughout the world. Direct contact with local KSB specialists makes it easier for companies to implement their projects quickly, flexibly and at a high level of quality. 


FROM A SINGLE SOURCE: PUMPS AND VALVES, SERVICES AND SYSTEMS:

• Pumps and valves for industrial applications
• Comprehensive KSB services and original spare parts
• Pumps, valves and systems for building services
• Automation and drive solutions
• Pumps, valves and systems for renewable energy applications
• Slurry pumps for mining, suction dredgers and the oil sand industry
• Pumps, valves and systems for water applications

• Pumps, valves and systems for energy applications

Name: Taiho Pharma Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd.
Description:
TAIHO PHARMA ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD. was established in Singapore in August 2011 as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Taiho Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

Sticking with our philosophy "by local. for local", Taiho Pharma Asia Pacific covers a wide range of jobs such as clinical research, regulatory affairs, medical affairs and sales as a hub for Taiho’s oncology business in South East Asia in close touch with local medical oncologists and the other medical professionals in cancer care.

Taiho Pharma Asia Pacific hopes to share our smile and happiness with local cancer patients, medical oncologists and the other medical professionals in cancer care in South East Asia by introducing our anticancer drugs and data with high quality.

Name: SESTO Robotics
Description:
SESTO Robotics is a leading solutions provider of Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) technology enabling companies worldwide to derive the benefits of Industry 4.0

Headquartered in Singapore, SESTO Robotics is a leading robotics company in the field of autonomous technology. Our Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs) and Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) are fully developed in-house and powered by our proprietary operating system that is characterised by cutting-edge intelligence and tasking capabilities.

Our class-leading and innovative products are proven to integrate seamlessly into various backend systems as well as physical infrastructures and have helped manufacturers worldwide deliver mission critical results through high uptime, scalability and ease of operation. With SESTO AMRs and AGVs, we enable companies to derive the benefits of Industry 4.0 by achieving efficiency through automation, flexibility and agility in manufacturing that are supported by data-driven decision making.

Name: Cerecin
Description:
Cerecin is a global healthcare company with more than 20 years of innovation and leadership in brain health.

At Cerecin we think differently. We develop novel evidence-based solutions that help people; pharmaceuticals, medical foods, diagnostics, medical devices and e-health products. These solutions target conditions ranging from memory impairment to some of the most devastating neurological diseases.

Name: KABAM Robotics
Description:
At KABAM Robotics, we believe service robots will free humans to pursue greater purpose. We are driven by our passion to empower the service workforce with technology.

Through our cutting-edge robotic connectivity technologies, and extensive commercial deployments, we enable smart cities and create a world of seamless connectivity for robots.

KABAM Robotics
Bringing Robots to the World

Name: Celero
Description:
Celero’s Vision: Reducing the barriers to market entry for Biotechs while addressing the unmet needs in emerging Asia and Africa.

Our mission is to achieve this vision by providing our Biotech partners with the highest quality, efficient and accelerated clinical trials in Emerging Asia and Africa, ultimately resulting in optimal returns on their investments. 

This endeavor will be propelled by our experienced clinical research team, leveraging local expertise, access to diverse populations, and forthcoming innovative digital solutions. 
Additionally, our clinical trial solutions will be fortified by the implementation of registration, commercial, and local manufacturing strategies meticulously tailored to the specific needs of our Biotech partners.
With 285 years of unparalleled expertise, our senior management team boasts 182 years in Clinical Operations, Site Management, Medical & Regulatory Affairs, and 103 years in Commercial, Pharma & Vaccines Manufacturing, and Clinical Finance. Our team has successfully completed 80 clinical trials, including 64 for vaccines, resulting in over 20 product approvals. 
We are dedicated to being a key contributor to the financial success of our sponsors' products by providing them market access to high commercial growth potential markets. 

If you believe your pipeline products are innovative, possess favorable efficacy and safety profiles, and have clear clinical differentiators, we want to talk. 

Contact us by visiting our website at www.celero.global or reaching out to us at info@celero.global.

Name: Pan Abrasives
Description:
Since 1973, Pan Abrasives has played a leading role with a comprehensive supply program supporting both local and regional surface preparation and finishing industry requirements.  

With our ready stock of products in both Singapore and Malaysia, we are well equipped to be your "One Stop Local Supply Source" via our sales and service personnel who are just one phone call away!

Name: HWArobotics
Description:
HWArobotics is a warehousing and logistics robot company based in Singapore, dedicated to providing high quality warehousing and logistics robot products for the global market. Our comprehensive product range is featured with pallet shuttle system, tote shuttle system, mini shuttle system, split-case picking system, and associated control software.

HWArobotics has assembled high-level international teams comprising industry experts with global perspectives. Headquartered in Singapore, HWArobotics has established subsidiaries in the United States, Europe, and South Korea. With manufacturing plants in Thailand and Chuzhou, China, leveraging the cost-effective supply chain attributes of Asia-Pacific region, HWArobotics is dedicated to providing clients with advanced and reliable logistics automation systems.

Drawing from over two decades of extensive product experience and pioneering technology, HWArobotics develops products characterized by advanced technology, stable performance and exceptional reliability.

Name: Curiox Biosystems
Description:
Curiox Biosystems is revolutionizing the field of suspension cell sample preparation with innovative technologies that address some of the biggest challenges in research and clinical diagnostics. Our groundbreaking Laminar Wash technology and C-Free platform set new standards for efficiency, precision, and ease, making us the most exciting company in the suspension cell sample prep space today.

The Laminar Wash system is designed to improve the quality of cell preparation by eliminating the traditional centrifugation steps that can disrupt cell integrity. This approach not only saves time but also enhances sample viability and consistency, leading to more accurate and reproducible results. Our C-Free platform takes automation to a new level, delivering customized, hands-free solutions that enable labs to streamline processes and maintain complete control over sample handling. By removing manual steps, C-Free offers unprecedented precision in cell prep, helping researchers achieve cleaner data with greater efficiency.

In 2023, Curiox Biosystems marked a major milestone by going public on the KOSDAQ exchange in Korea, a testament to our growth, innovation, and industry impact. This achievement has fueled our momentum as we expand both in personnel and technology, adding talent and resources to support our vision of transforming life sciences. With a growing portfolio of solutions and a talented team dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what’s possible, Curiox Biosystems is a company to watch.

Name: Tractors Singapore Limited
Description:
Established on 20 January 1966, Tractors Singapore Limited (TSL) is the leading equipment dealer in Singapore. We are a full line Cat dealer distributing Cat machines and engines for the service territories of the Republic of Singapore, the Republic of Maldives and Christmas Island (Indian Ocean). 

Our ties with Caterpillar go back to the 1920s when our parent company - Sime Darby - acquired the Cat dealership for Sarawak. Apart from the Cat dealership, TSL is also the dealer for Hyster Lift Truck, Parker filters, New Holland Industrial and Agricultural equipment and Sullair Air Compressors. We offer a full range of services including sales, rental, parts and service support.

A Sime Company

Name: AMILI
Description:
AMILI is the #1 precision gut microbiome company in Southeast Asia, based in Singapore. AMILI hosts Southeast Asia’s first and only gut microbiome transplant bank and the world’s largest multi-ethnic Asian gut microbiome database. Our precision-driven, end-to-end platform captures unparalleled insights into gut microbiome abundance, functionality, and its impact on health.

For more information, visit www.amili.asia.

Name: Tokimeku
Description:
Tokimeku is an automation solutions provider and systems integrator with expertise in laser and joining technologies.

Specializing in modular, "bite-sized" automation, we empower manufacturers to adopt automation incrementally—without disrupting existing workflows. Each solution is tailored to meet specific operational requirements, whether automating an entire production line or a targeted process. By leveraging customers’ existing equipment and integrating standalone systems to work cohesively, we help our customers avoid large capital expenditures or risky overhauls.

We offer comprehensive engineering consultancy, proof-of-concept development, and design-for-manufacturing (DFM) proposals—each supported by dependable, regionally based service and technical support.

At Tokimeku, we are committed to fully understanding your operational needs and providing expert guidance that aligns with your strategic objectives. Coupled with high-quality offerings from certified brand partners, we deliver bespoke automation solutions that integrate seamlessly into your operations.

Name: Advanced Micro Foundry
Description:
Advanced Micro Foundry (AMF) is now part of GlobalFoundries.

AMF is a Silicon Photonics specialty foundry based in Singapore. The company provides innovative Si Photonics manufacturing solutions for advanced applications of Optical Communication, Sensing, Ranging and Computing. AMF offers manufacturing services with competitive cycle times based on unique application specific platforms. Services range from MPW to prototyping and large volume manufacturing services for product deployment.

Name: CREG TBM Singapore Branch
Description: CREG - China Railway Engineering Equipment Group Co., Ltd. - is a leading TBM supplier with a capacity to manufacture up 280 metro-size TBM per year. Headquartered in the center of China, CREG provides full-range TBM solutions together with its up-to-date technical solutions highly oriented towards project challenges and customer expectations. As of now, CREG has manufactured over 1000 TBMs and bored through more than 2000km of tunnels. Other than China, CREG has also established its presence in 21 countries. CREG is able to produce all types of TBM namely EPB TBM, Slurry TBM, Single/double-shield TBM, Gripper TBM and multi-mode TBM with boring dia. ranging from 3 m to 16 m. These TBMs have achieved exceptional performances and are highly appreciated by customers worldwide. This speaks of CREG's strong commitment to provide technical assistance and manufacturing quality at the highest level. Other than TBM manufacturing, CREG also produces a wide range of auxiliary tunneling equipment such as shaft boring machine, drilling jumbo, roadheader, disc cutters, locomotives, rollign stocks as well as tunneling formworks and building structures. CREG Singapore Branch - Subsidiary of CREG China – is established in 2015 to render full support for Southeast Asia region particularly the after sales service. To date, CREG has supplied over 20 TBMs in Singapore and as of the end of 2019, more than half of the projects have been successfully completed.

Name: Engine Biosciences
Description:
Engine Biosciences is a venture-backed San Francisco- and Asia-based technology company pioneering network biomedicine. Our proprietary and patented technologies oriented around deciphering the complexity of biology networks include both high-throughput wet lab experimentation and artificial intelligence algorithms for drug discovery and cellular reprogramming. This platform, developed through several years of research by our scientific founding and leadership team who include faculty members at MIT, Harvard, Mayo Clinic, and UCSD, dramatically accelerates and reduces costs of the R&D process for new medical therapies.  We are actively applying the platform internally and with partners across a range of disease indications.

In January 2018, we announced the closing of a US$10M seed round from notable biotech and tech institutional investors and are expanding the team.

Name: Cordlife Group Limited
Description: Cordlife owns the largest network of cord blood banks in Asia with full stem cell banking facilities in six key markets, namely Singapore, Hong Kong, Indonesia, India, Malaysia and the Philippines. In Singapore, Hong Kong, the Philippines and Indonesia, Cordlife operates the largest private cord blood banks and it is amongst the top three market leaders in India and Malaysia. In January 2018, Cordlife became the market leader in Hong Kong with the acquisition of the largest private cord blood bank, Healthbaby Biotech (Hong Kong) Co., Limited. Through its majority-owned subsidiary in Malaysia, Stemlife Berhad, Cordlife holds an indirect stake in Thailand's largest private cord blood bank, Thai Stemlife. Cordlife has also established its presence in Myanmar, Vietnam, Macau, Brunei and Bangladesh.

Name: Dovoy
Description:
Dovoy is a leading enzyme manufacturer, and is well known for providing innovative, customised solutions. We have gained unparalleled proficiency in textile processing, grain-processing, animal health and nutrition, brewing, bakery, dairy and meat processing industries. 

With our advanced and modern technologies, we develop and deliver specialised high-quality enzymes that drive results, maximise savings, and reduce environmental footprint. 

We have always been instrumental in understanding the constantly changing needs and challenges of industries and harnessing the power of biotechnology to create products and solutions that are sustainable, innovative, offer maximum value and are reliable. 

Let’s shape a better future with biotechnology.

Name: FUCHS Lubricants India & Southeast Asia
Description:
Worldwide Number 1 - the world's leading supplier of lubricants among the independent companies
 
FUCHS is a global Group with German roots that develops, produces and distributes lubricants and related specialties. FUCHS is a globally operating corporation, employing worldwide almost 5.000 employees in more than 50 operating companies in more than 40 countries.

We have more than 100,000 customers, including companies from the following fields: automotive suppliers, OEM, mining and exploration, metalworking, agriculture and forestry, aerospace, power generation, mechanical engineering, construction and transport, as well as the steel, metal and cement industries, yet also companies in the food industry, the glass production sector and the casting and forging industry – and many others. 

In close contact with its customers, FUCHS develops holistic, innovative and custom-made solutions for the most diverse applications. As a lubricant manufacturer, FUCHS stands for performance and sustainability, for safety and reliability, for efficiency and cost savings. FUCHS stands for a promise: technology that pays back.

In the region India & Southeast Asia FUCHS has 7 wholly owned subsidiaries in India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Taiwan, Thailand and Vietnam and a regional office located in Singapore. 

For more information: http://www.fuchs.com/group/

Name: Chong Lee Leong Seng Singapore Co Ltd
Description:
About Chong Lee Leong Seng
Established in 1959, CLLS Co Ltd (or CLLSE Sdn Bhd) is a leading distributor and OEM of engineering equipment for the marine and industrial sectors. We put the needs of our customers first, providing quality products, services and after-sales support.

Find out more about us.

Name: UTOC Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
Nature of Business:

Process Mechanical Works (Process & Utilities) including: Piping works, fabrication & installation

# Equipment, assembly & erection
# Plant maintenance & shutdown
# Structural & general steel fabrication & installation

Name: ScaleUp Bio
Description:
Welcome to ScaleUp Bio’s LinkedIn channel!
 
ScaleUp Bio is a Singapore-based CDMO specializing in precision fermentation for food, nutrition, and specialty bio-based ingredients. We help innovators scale from lab to market with end-to-end services – from process development, scale up, and cost-down for early commercial production – in our certified GMP facilities.

Backed by ADM and Nurasa, a Temasek company, we combine fermentation expertise with state-of-the-art infrastructure to accelerate product development and deliver high-quality, scalable solutions for bio-based products.

To learn how your business can scale to success pls visit www.scaleupbio.com or email us today at hello@scaleupbio.com

Name: Green Instruments
Description: At Green Instruments, we are passionate about helping our customers demonstrate environmental regulatory compliance and ensure a safe and reliable transport of people and cargo.  Our solutions for emission control, water and gas monitoring, hazard detection and energy optimization, help our customers operate in a safer, more efficient, and environmentally friendly way. Green instrument is a solid global business with more than ten years of experience in monitoring and analyzing exhaust gasses on ocean going vessels. Besides, we are the pioneer in monitoring wash water after exhaust gas cleaning systems. Our head office is in Denmark, and we have offices in USA and Singapore and employ 80+ dedicated and skilled people.

Name: NUTEK PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Nutek Private Limited (Nutek) conceptualises, designs and manufactures automated production systems to customer specifications. Nutek is highly regarded for its world-class quality products, produced with the flexibility and nimbleness demanded by its customers all over the world. 

Our core business includes PCB Handling Equipment for PCBA industry, Material Handling System for Semicon Industry, Original Equipment Manufacturing (OEM) for Capital Equipment Manufacturers and Original Design Manufacturing (ODM) for other brand names.

Name: SepPure Technologies
Description:
SepPure Technologies creates sustainable nanofiltration solutions to separate chemical mixtures at a molecular level with minimal energy use.
Up to 15% of the world’s total energy is spent on industrial-scale chemical separations. This is economically and environmentally inefficient. SepPure Technologies is disrupting the energy-intensive chemical separation processes, such as distillation and evaporation, through the introduction of novel chemical-resistant nanofiltration membranes. SepPure Technologies’ sustainable process does not use heat, thus lowering global energy use, emissions, and pollution substantially.

Name: LITEON SINGAPORE
Description:
LITEON Singapore (LITE-ON Singapore Pte Ltd) is part of LITE-ON Technology Corporation, a world-leading provider in optoelectronic components and key electronic modules. In recent years, with its active deployment in the fields of cloud computing, automotive electronics, 5G, AIoT, optoelectronics, etc., cultivation of smart industries, coupled with development of new business opportunities and products required for smart life and smart cities, LITEON continues to use its professionalism, rich industrial experience, high-quality products and services, and global operations bases, and become the preferred best partner of global customers for developing innovation and application of smart technology.

LITEON Singapore engages in quality semiconductor research and design, assembly and packaging machinery, smart vehicle and automotive electronics design, OEM and ODM of power supplies to meet the demands of its regional customers. 

LITEON produces products that are used in a broad range of applications, such as computers, communications, consumer electronics, automotive electronics, LED lighting, cloud computing, industrial automation.

Name: Bauer Technologies Far East Group
Description:
The successful story of BAUER in the Far East Region started in 1981, when BAUER opened up in Malaysia. Since then a vast number of projects had been executed in all fields of foundation engineering and construction. The Company is permanently present in Malaysia, Singapore, Hong Kong, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines, India, Australia, New Zealand and Vietnam. Projects in countries without permanent presence are executed either from the headquarter in Singapore or the adjacent country.
The close cooperation of the countries in the region allows each individual country to join projects of very large scale and special technologies, as the required resources and know-how can be provided always from the network.

Name: Credo Diagnostics Biomedical
Description:
Credo Diagnostics Biomedical develops, manufactures, and commercializes innovative, cost-effective, and rapid Molecular Diagnostic solutions at the Point-of-Care (POC) in the areas of human infectious diseases and animal health.

At Credo Diagnostics Biomedical, we are conscious of the necessity to simplify processes and accelerate molecular testing at lower costs. We believe that effective rapid POC Molecular Diagnostics will redefine healthcare for both human and veterinary clinical management. 

By providing the right information, at the right time, and to the right people, we can improve the lives of billions of people and animals around the world. 

For any inquiries, please contact us at: service@credodxbiomed.com

Name: BESI Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
Besi Singapore was founded in 2002 and is part of the global Besi Group. 280 highly qualified employees are employed in modern innovation-promoting work environment in Singapore.
Besi SG is the center of Excellence for Besi in Asia; sustaining Besi mainstream products (Die Attach, Submicron, Packaging and Plating) in Asia. Its Product Management team provides commercial and technical supports to Mainstream customers worldwide. 
With an 800 meter square testing lab, Besi Singapore is capable to perform customer sample built, DOE and machine demo, especially to adjacent Asia customers. The process lab ISO4 clean room offers the collaboration opportunity with major IDMs and OSATs on development of 3D SOIC Advanced Packaging processes and equipment. 
With 150 R&D engineers specializing in full spectrum of engineering (Software, hardware, vision, motion, processes and manufacturing), R&D Besi SG develops customized solutions to mainstream customers, sustain Besi mainstream products and offer technical expertise in solving customers' process challenges.  Together with other shared services: Finance, IT, Order Processing and HR; Besi SG forms the backbone that connects the dots of Besi Worldwide.
Besi is committed to surpassing customers´ needs by constantly setting new industry standards and is engaged in one line of business: the development, manufacturing, marketing, sales and service of semiconductor assembly equipment for the global semiconductor and electronics industries. Besi's customers are primarily leading multinational chip manufacturers, assembly subcontractors and electronics and industrial companies. Besi's assembly equipment product portfolio is primarily designed and developed in Europe and manufactured in Asia. Our products constantly demonstrate the 
company´s innovative strength and future industry standards. 280 people are currently employed at No. 1, Science Park Road. Singapore Science Park 2, Capricorn Building occupying mainly level 3 and 4.

Name: Ample Solutions
Description:
Ample Solutions is an independent electronic component distributor that offers global supply chain solutions to electronics manufacturers worldwide. Its services include component distribution, shortage sourcing, excess inventory management and more. 

Headquartered in Singapore, Ample Solutions has 8 Asia regional offices and over 500 employees worldwide. With ISO 9001:2015 certification and membership in the ERAI, Ample Solutions has two world-class quality assurance centres separately in Hong Kong and Shenzhen, to provide high-quality components in the shortest lead time.

Name: Global Power Source Group
Description:
Global Power Source has dominated the power backup industry since 1987 and is considered as the top five Battery Suppliers in the UPS battery application. With a group turnover of $100 million and with more than 18 offices worldwide, Global Power Source is driven by innovation. 

In 2009, Global Power Source developed and designed an innovative battery monitoring system called Enertect. The synergy of the in house software development team and Battery and UPS field level experience has contributed to the success of Enertect. 

Our aim is to not only continuously innovate and grow, we aim to provide green solutions across the world. We have entered all the substantial market segments and are registered vendors with the top IT companies, banks and telecommunication providers.

Name: RAM Spreaders - RAM Lifting Technologies
Description:
RAM Spreaders are a leading lifting technologies supplier, providing container handling solutions for Ports and Terminals around the world. RAM specialise in manufacturing container spreaders for Ship to Shore Cranes, Yard Gantry Cranes and Mobile Harbour Cranes. 

RAM Spreaders have used their engineering expertise to improve the handling of bulk materials creating the innovative RAM Revolver. 

The company has also introduced to telescopic pipe handling spreader to improve the efficiency and safety of handling concrete coated steel pipes in the oil and gas industry. 

The company's latest innovation which is set to revolutionise the container handling industry is the PinSmart II. The machine is designed to autonomously remove and place container twistlocks without human intervention. This will improve quayside productivity helping ports achieve a new standard of moving 40 containers per hour. Moreover, automating the handling of twistlocks will help ports reduce their costs and energy demand. 

We have over 50 years in the container handling industry. Let's work together to improve your operations.

Name: Mitsui Chemicals Asia Pacific (MCAP)
Description:
Established in 1997, Mitsui Chemicals Asia Pacific, Ltd. (MCAP) is the Asia Pacific Regional Headquarter of Mitsui Chemicals Inc., covering ASEAN, South Asia, Nations along the Gulf in Middle East and Oceania. 

Being the Asia Pacific growth functional hub, MCAP strives to drive business growth, provide robust functional services to regional affiliates or businesses, and deliver values to customers leveraging full power of Mitsui Chemicals Group. MCAP is wholly-owned by Mitsui Chemicals, Inc.

About Mitsui Chemicals Group in Singapore

Singapore is the home to five local affiliates for Mitsui Chemicals Group. Besides Mitsui Chemicals Asia Pacific, Ltd. (MCAP) is the Asia Pacific Regional Headquarter of Mitsui Chemicals Inc., the other four entities include Mitsui Elastomers Singapore Pte Ltd (MELS), Prime Evolue Singapore Pte.Ltd. (EVLS), SDC Technologies Asia Pacific Pte Ltd (SDC AP) and Mitsui Chemicals Singapore R&D Centre Pte Ltd (MS-R&D).

Name: Singapore Biodesign
Description:
Mission: High-touch development of healthtech talent centered on needs-based approach and quality industry mentoring to accelerate health technology innovation and adoption for Asia's (Singapore, China and ASEAN) unmet healthcare needs.

Vision: To be Asia's leading healthtech talent development and knowledge partner for accelerating health technologies innovation towards commercialization and adoption.

Modelled after the established Biodesign Programme at Stanford University, Singapore Biodesign (SB) is a capability development initiative that aims to train and nurture the next generation of healthtech innovators for Asia. We are a dedicated healthtech innovation talent and knowledge resource riding on the robust biodesign methodology and wide-ranging international network to achieve synergies with local ecosystem partners and to place and equip talent in critical startup and innovation roles to accelerate projects towards commercialization and startup creation.

Name: Insect Feed Technologies
Description:
We farm black soldier flies as a reliable, cost-effective and sustainable source of protein to feed animals.

Insect farming is an emerging practice, where waste is fed directly to insects. This converts low value biomass into higher value insect mass, rich in proteins, fats and chitin. Insects can then be used as sustainable inputs for a variety of sectors, most notably high quality animal feeds demanded by the aquaculture sector & premium pet food markets.

We partner with various food manufacturing companies to dispose their food waste. If you have a food manufacturing facility or have a constant food waste stream that requires disposal, do reach out to us below.

Name: noovoleum
Description: noovoleum is a pioneering company dedicated to revolutionizing waste management through technology and automation, and promoting a sustainable future. Our innovative solution empowers individuals to transform Used Cooking Oil into a valuable resource while earning monetary incentives

Name: Expecto Health Science
Description: Expecto Health Science, a leading Clinical Research Organization headquartered in Singapore, specializes in delivering comprehensive and cost-effective services throughout the Asia Pacific Region. Our expertise encompasses Clinical Development, Data Management, Medical Writing, Regulatory, and Pharmacovigilance, offering tailored solutions for our clients. We pride ourselves on our tailored FSP (Functional Service Provider) solutions, providing strategic resourcing options to regional and global Pharma clients in the most cost-efficient manner. Our client base spans from companies pioneering new chemical entities, biologicals in their early clinical development phases, to small/mid-sized pharmaceutical and biotechnology firms with niche products, and medical device companies.

Name: Opulent
Description:
Since 2002, Opulent has been earning the trust of our clients and playing a pivotal role in their success through our complex manufacturing solutions.
 
From our humble beginnings in trading of electronic components, we have since transformed ourselves into an elite global manufacturer with a proven track record of complex electronics manufacturing capabilities. While our roots are firmly planted in Singapore, we have established international presence with facilities and site offices spanning across Malaysia, China, Hong Kong, Japan, Europe, Australia and Americas, boasting a staff strength of more than 500. 
 
With the ever-shifting business landscape, we understand the need to evolve along with our clients. That's why we are not settling to be just another cookie-cutter electronic manufacturing company. We deliver manufacturing solutions of high complexity that encompass every stage of your product creation. As an extension of your business operations, we practise innovative, complex manufacturing that leads you from conception to completion. From technical specification analysis, ideation and design, prototyping, product development to the actual manufacturing of the products, we leave no stone unturned. 
 
For every product, we customise our solution to tailor to your needs. Our team of dedicated specialists will take on each challenge, break down its complexity, dissect its intricacy and provide you with a satisfactorily assembled outcome. This includes analysing every idea, every design, every function and every component at its fundamental level and offering simpler, smarter solutions. We do so because we do not want to manufacture just another item. With us, we turn your visions into vivid products. With us, we turn complex issues into simplified solution. With us, your products are made smarter.

Key Service Lines: Technical Specification Analysis, Ideation & Design, Prototyping, Product Development, Manufacturing.

Name: Chemical Industries (Far East) Limited
Description: Chemical Industries (Far East) Limited ("CIL") was established in 1963 as a manufacturer of chlorine, caustic soda and other chlor-alkali products in Singapore. CIL was established as a pioneer company to underpin the industrialization efforts of Singapore, and continues to be the prime supplier of basic chemicals to the petro-chemical, pharmaceutical, electronics and water-treatment industries. CIL is also a friend of water and has been supporting every stage of Singapore’s journey towards water independence by providing key chemicals for the city state’s water purification processes.

Name: Vivance
Description: Vivance is a patient-centric medical technology company with a mission to enhance the lives of people with kidney care and their caregivers by providing solutions to deliver better outcomes along with improving their quality of life.

Name: Vivo Surgical
Description:
Vivo Surgical is a patient-centric, clinically-driven medical device developer and manufacturer.

Headquartered in Singapore with commercial and clinical partnerships in over 20 international territories, the company is pioneering a novel endoscopic surgical robot for advanced endoluminal procedures in the gastrointestinal tract and beyond. 

ISO 13485 certified with international accreditations awarded such as the US FDA and European CE mark, the company’s unique devices target the medical needs of the world through innovative applications of science & technology. 

Currently, Vivo Surgical’s proprietary technologies encompass fields such as in vivo surgical lighting, portable flexible endoscopy and endoscopic surgical robotics.

Name: SRS Life Sciences Pte Ltd
Description:
At SRS Life Sciences, we exist to change what’s possible for the health of the 6 billion people living in emerging nations. We continuously identify the most pressing unmet healthcare needs so we can be the first to deliver products and solutions that lessen the burden of disease. 
Through transformational innovation, we have tackled and improved disease burden by delivering new possibilities in drug delivery systems, formulations, and medical diagnostic solutions

Name: Fineline Global
Description:
To be and stay successful in these turbulent times, it's crucial to redefine how you think, move, and react.  

As a leading provider of PCBs, we can provide you with a diverse portfolio of technologies and address any technical challenges and deliver flexible solutions that meet your exact requirements. With a global presence, more than 350 expert employees worldwide, and market solutions for over 50 countries, we know the unique nuances and requirements of local markets. No matter your location, we are committed to meeting you in your language and time zone - supporting your journey every step of the way. 
As your trusted partner, we will leverage our extensive network and strong supplier relationships to provide you with the confidence and peace of mind you need!  

With foresight, trust, and reliability, we are defining excellence. 

Check out our website today to learn how we can manifest your business vision and streamline all your PCB needs!

Name: ImmunoScape
Description:
ImmunoScape is a pre-clinical biotechnology company focused on the discovery and development of next-generation TCR cell therapies in the field of oncology. The company's proprietary Deep Immunomics technology platform enables highly sensitive, large-scale mining and immune profiling of T cells in cancer patient samples to identify novel, therapeutically relevant TCRs across multiple types of solid tumors. ImmunoScape has multiple discovery programs ongoing and will be progressing towards IND-enabling studies and entry into the clinic.

To learn more, visit us at immunoscape.com and follow us on Twitter @immunoscape.

Name: BGIN
Description:
(NASDAQ: BGIN) We are a leading global blockchain infrastructure company that specializes in high-performance mining machines (ICERIVER) and a range of comprehensive hosting services. Our full-service solutions are designed to support clients at every stage, lowering the high entry barriers to the industry and setting new standards for excellence. 

Our mission is to make digital asset mining accessible to all by developing innovative products designed to meet the needs of a wide range of customers, from beginners to large-scale industrial miners.

Name: Nucleic Acid Therapeutics Initiative (NATi)
Description:
The Nucleic Acid Therapeutics Initiative (NATi) is a national platform that aims to build Singapore into a regional hub for nucleic acid therapeutics (NAT) research, clinical translation, and commercialisation.

NATi harnesses the potential of nucleic acids to treat diseases using RNA molecules. This initiative bolsters strategic partnerships and propels healthcare innovations, benefitting Singapore and Singaporeans.

Name: Syntech Chemicals Pte Ltd
Description:
SynTech Chemicals, based in Singapore, is one of the region’s leading, homegrown companies in hygiene management.  
We were established in 1999 with the goal of developing, manufacturing and marketing high-quality cleaning detergents and hygiene solutions for food, hospitality and institutional industries for the Asian market, at more competitive prices than multinational manufacturers.

Name: Petracarbon
Description:
Petracarbon is a diversified engineering company involved in various industries namely semiconductor, telecommunication, electronic manufacturing, and downstream oil and gas industries.

We have a history of 40 years located in 5 countries and a workforce of more than 300. We inspire to be at the forefront of our industries by focusing on developing good company culture as well as being consumer-centric and innovative.

Moving forward, Petracarbon aims to build an environmentally sustainable enterprise by doing good for society, people, and the environment at large.

Name: Weidmuller Southeast Asia
Description:
Weidmüller – Your partner in Industrial Connectivity

As experienced experts we support our customers and partners around the world with products, solutions and services in the industrial environment of power, signal and data. We are at home in their industries and markets and know the technological challenges of tomorrow. We are therefore continuously developing innovative, sustainable and useful solutions for their individual needs. Together we set standards in Industrial Connectivity.

The Weidmüller Group owns manufacturing plants, sales companies and representatives in more than 80 countries.

In its fiscal year 2017 Weidmüller reached sales of 740 million Euros with 4,700 employees.

Name: Pharmagend Global Medical Services Pte Ltd
Description:
Pharmagend is a Singapore-based integrated drug products manufacturing platform, focused on the development and manufacturing of high-quality drug products. We are committed to providing safe and effective pharmaceutical solutions to meet the needs of patients worldwide.

As a pharmaceutical company, Pharmagend has advanced equipment and a high-quality system to ensure we meet global standards. We have experienced teams with extensive knowledge in formulation, engineering, manufacturing, quality control, quality assurance, and IT, etc.

Pharmagend's shareholders include well-known companies such as Rxilient Health, Pharmaron, CMS, and Legend Investment. The investment from these shareholders brings unique value and broad opportunities to our company.

Name: Specialised Therapeutics
Description:
Specialised Therapeutics is an international, independent pharmaceutical company providing specialist medicines to patients in Australia, New Zealand and across South East Asia. 

Founded in 2008 by international pharmaceutical executives Carlo Montagner and Bozena Zembrzuski, Specialised Therapeutics began with a single oncology product that is now one of the most successful branded chemotherapies ever commercialised in Australia. Since its inception, the ST product portfolio has expanded, now spanning oncology, haematology, neurology, supportive care, genomic assays and ophthalmology - although it is not confined to these therapy areas.

ST is headquartered in Singapore, with representative offices in Australia and New Zealand. It partners with international biotech and pharmaceutical companies, expertly championing their products from pre-registration to full commercialisation in key AU, NZ and SE Asia regions. With extensive experience navigating complex regulatory and reimbursement pathways in diverse markets, it maintains a highly successful track record of commercialising specialty products.

 International Partners include:

. Incyte Biosciences International
. Celgene (acquired by BMS)
. Puma Biotechnology
.  Helsinn Healthcare
. photonamic GmbH
. Ariad Pharmaceuticals (now Takeda Pharmaceuticals)
. Genomic Health Inc (now Exact Sciences)
. Alimera Sciences Inc 
. PharmaMar
. Onconova Therapeutics

Name: GP Energy Tech
Description: GP Energy Tech International Pte. Limited (“GP Energy Tech”) is a member of Gold Peak Technology Group Limited (SEHK: 40). With comprehensive experience in developing and manufacturing Nickel-based batteries in high volume operations, GP Energy Tech is a battery technology leader and specialist in Rechargeable Batteries for consumer and industrial applications. GP Energy Tech is committed to delivering sustainable innovations as well as battery advancement for energy storage solutions, taking the lead in responsible business and in helping to build a greener future.

Name: Aevice Health
Description:
Aevice Health is a MedTech company developing smart wearable stethoscopes for continuous and remote monitoring of respiratory health. Its flagship device, the AeviceMD, is FDA-cleared in the US and approved in Singapore, designed to continuously monitor patients with asthma and COPD in the comfort of their homes.

At Aevice Health, our mission is to drive medical innovations that transform healthcare, improve outcomes and empower lives.

More information about the company can be found at www.aevice.com.

Name: I2Cure Pte. Limited
Description:
I2Cure Pte Limited is a global biotech company founded by an IIT-Kanpur alumnus and backed by research Institutions. 
The first to bring the world a broad range of Pharmaceutical & Cosmeceutical products with the breakthrough in advanced Molecular iodine (I₂) Science.
All the products manufactured are based on patented Advanced Molecular Iodine (I₂) technology, in India, for the world.

Name: HIMA Asia Pacific
Description:
The HIMA Group is a global independent provider of safety-related automation solutions for the process and rail industries that protect people, assets, and the environment from harm. Founded in 1908, the family-owned company is headquartered in Brühl, near Mannheim, (Germany). The HIMA Group employs approx. 1100 employees in 22 group companies worldwide. 

Regional centers are located in Breda, the Netherlands (Europe, HIMA Benelux), Stockport, England (UK, Sella Controls), Kristiansand, Norway (Scandinavia, Origo Solutions), Singapore (North and South East Asia, HIMA Asia-Pacific), Perth (Australia and New Zealand, HIMA Australia), Shanghai (HIMA China), Dubai, United Arab Emirates (HIMA Middle East) and Houston, USA (North America, HIMA Americas). 

The open and independent HIMA Safety Platform combines hardware and software on a single technology platform and offers a uniform security concept. With more than 50,000 installed safety systems (SIL 3 / SIL 4, PL e, CENELEC SIL 4), HIMA is considered a technology leader. In addition to proven safety technology, HIMA offers consulting, safety engineering, and services as well as training. This results in solutions that ensure functional safety and OT security, compliance with standards, process efficiency and plant availability throughout the entire safety lifecycle. 

As a safety expert, HIMA is pioneering the digitalization of functional safety and generates significant added value for customers with holistic safety solutions. #safetygoesdigital

The HIMA Asia Pacific office in Singapore is the regional headquarters for the local operations in South Korea, Japan, Singapore, and Malaysia. Since the early 1990s, HIMA has worked with leading companies throughout Asia Pacific, helping them to operate their plants safely and profitably. Together with our partner network we deliver the highest level of services.

Subscribe HIMA Newsletter: https://www.hima.com/Newsletter  
Legal Notice: https://www.hima.com/en/legal-notice

Name: MEIDEN SINGAPORE PTE LTD
Description:
Meiden Singapore Pte Ltd (MSL) was established in 1975 as the manufacturing, engineering, and R&D hub in Southeast Asia for Meidensha Corporation, a Nikkei 225 company in Japan. 

MSL offers products and solutions in the power, rail transport, water treatment, and industrial automation industries. 

In 2018, the Land Transport Authority (LTA) of Singapore awarded MSL a S$500m contract to upgrade and renew the power supply system on the North-South and East-West MRT lines. 

Why Join Us?
A Global Footprint: From Singapore to the World
Founded by Meidensha (Japan) in 1975, Meiden Singapore is part of an extensive and robust network of Meiden Group companies in the United States, Europe and Asia.

At Meiden, we promote a fair and just employment practice. We respect employees’ individual abilities and build on their strength to further develop them. We provide a series of comprehensive training programs for both professional and personal development of our employees. 

If you, too, would like to be part of our exceptional team of enthusiasts, we invite you to send us your resume to recruit@meidensg.com.sg.

Name: Mitsubishi Electric Singapore
Description:
Mitsubishi Electric is one of the world's leading names in manufacturing and sales of electrical and electronic products and systems used in a broad range of fields and applications. As a global, leading green company, we are applying our technologies to contribute to society and daily life around the world. Come and explore our footprints in Singapore.

Our offices in Singapore include Mitsubishi Electric Asia Pte Ltd and Mitsubishi Elevator (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. 

We have a wide range of products from building systems, air conditioning systems, space systems, energy systems, factory automation systems, semiconductors and devices, transportation systems, automotive equipment, information and communication systems, visual information systems, public systems, home products, elevators and escalators.

Name: Tat Hong
Description:
Tat Hong is one of the largest crane companies in ASEAN region, providing crane rental and heavy lifting solutions to the local market. 

We are proud to have served some of the world's leading organizations from diverse industries, including construction and engineering, infrastructure, oil and gas, power generation and natural resources.

Name: AdoreSys
Description: Best-in-class ASIC Solution Provider for AI HPC, Automotive ADAS & Chiplet

Name: RC Labs
Description:
RC Labs designs and manufactures intelligent battery management systems for electric vehicles and stationary energy storage. Our BMS is physically modular, adaptive and chemistry agnostic. RC Labs was incorporated in Nov 2019 capitalizing on 7 years of research at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University on how to enhance management for Li-ion batteries. We have offices in Hong Kong S.A.R. and Bangalore, India.

We work with EV OEMs, battery pack manufacturers and robotic companies. The team is always scouting for exceptional talents in the areas of power electronics, battery engineering, embedded systems design, UI/UX and data science. We encourage you to contact us if you’re interested in the work we do.

Name: ZwickRoell Singapore
Description:
ZwickRoell is one of the world’s leading suppliers of materials and component testing systems, used worldwide in R&D and quality assurance in more than 20 industries. With over 160 years of expertise, we stand for reliable test results and are committed to helping you improve the performance and safety of your products. 

ZwickRoell Pte. Ltd. in Singapore has been managing sales and service in Southeast Asia, South Korea, and Australasia since 1997. The company operates through a network of five direct sales and service organizations and five exclusive distribution partners across the region. As a key link to the ZwickRoell Group, ZwickRoell Singapore ensures smooth processes and adherence to company standards. 

As an independent, family-owned business, ZwickRoell Singapore is dedicated to providing intelligent testing solutions and exceptional service while emphasizing long-term partnerships and social responsibility. The headquarters in Singapore features a unique ZwickRoell Xperience Center, which combines a state-of-the-art testing laboratory with a platform for events. We are proud to support a growing team of 54 employees (status 2024) in the region, further enhancing our commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

Name: RC Labs
Description:

Name: ClearSmile Asia Pte. Ltd.
Description:
ClearSmile Asia Pte Ltd was established in 2012, we are probably the 1st locally produced invisible clear aligner provider (an alternative to metal braces) for doctors in South East Asia. Our aligners are currently available in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, Cambodia, Myanmar & Laos and produced by our own ISO13485:2016 compliant manufacturer.

Our mission is to become the global market leader in providing affordable full orthodontics treatment clear aligners. We are actively looking for DISTRIBUTORS AND PARTNERS throughout the world to realize our mission.

The Product :-
ClearSmile Invisible Aligners (CSIA) is an invisible/clear aligner that straightens your teeth without metal brackets and wires. A simple solution and alternative that allows you to achieve the prefect smile.

CSIA consists of a series of aligners which are digitally designed and worn over a period of 6 months to 15 months depending on the severity complexity of the patient's teeth.

CSIA treatment are faster than conventional braces, removable, hygienic and are non-intrusive to your daily life. Our aligners are easy to put on and take off. You’ll only need to remove them for brushing or flossing your teeth, during meals and enjoying hot beverages. We also encourage taking them off while having coloured carbonated drinks as the artificial colouring may stain and make them less invisible.

All our cases are fully prescribed, treated and monitored by a licensed dentist in person from the start until the end of treatment. In addition, the treatment is fully responsible by the treating dentist.

CSIA treatment will help you to achieve these specific needs:

* Improves the way you bite with your back teeth.
* Improves the alignment of your front teeth.
* Improves the appearance of your smile.
* Improves the overall health of your teeth and gums.
* Improves the ease of caring for your teeth.

Follow us on

Instagram : clearsmileinvisiblealigners

Description:

Our fab supports fast turn-around full reticle field or MPWs (<2 months depending on number of mask layers) and high-volume mass production requirements of full photonics integrated circuits with active and passive components.

Our offerings include:
•	Si waveguides
•	SiN waveguides

•	TiN heater and ion implantation doped heater

•	Ge photodetector
•	Both Cu and Al BEOL metal layers

In 2004, our scientists isolated Epithelial and Mesenchymal Stem Cells from the Umbilical Cord Lining Membrane. This novel and significant discovery was put up for intellectual property protection, and to date we have patents granted in multiple strategic key territories around the world.
 
The umbilical cord lining membrane is now known to be the richest source of stem cells in the body, and both epithelial and mesenchymal stem cells are being researched intensively with collaborators all around the world to exploit their potential for downstream medical therapy. Considerable headway has already been achieved, and we have started USFDA Clinical Trials with our collaborators in the USA, leading to a therapy to accelerate wound healing.

We offer a wide range of safety valves to cover all industries e.g. Chemical, Petrochemical, Oil & Gas, FPSO, Food & Beverage and Technical Gas, etc.
 
Our valves vary in size (from ½” to 12”), pressure class (up to 850bar) and materials (including carbon steel, stainless steel and corrosion-resistant alloys e.g. duplex, monel, etc.), to handle a wide range of temperatures (-200°C to 550°C) and substances (including liquids, gases, corrosives).
We are also able to couple our safety valve with pressure management products such as remote sensors and lift indicators, which help our customers identify over-pressure scenarios at an early stage.
 
LESER LLP is 1 of the 9 subsidiaries of LESER GmbH & Co. KG in Singapore, which was initiated by high demand of stocks and fast supplies from OEM & MRO business in the Southeast Asia region.

We believe that with the combination of a local subsidiary gives us the depth and flexibility to adapt to the multifaceted needs of our market.
