Name: Quantum Technology Group Limited (QTG)
Description:
Quantum Technology Group Limited (QTG) was established by Mr. Chan Ki in 2010, and was registered in the Cayman Islands. It is headquartered in Singapore, and incorporated in USA, Germany, Hong Kong and China. QTG focuses on research in the area of isothermal heat transfer. We strive for technological innovation, and created QIT medium which provides isothermal heat transfer and even with a negative temperature gradient in large metallic and non-metallic thermal components. This revolutionary technological advancement can promote the upgrading of thermal products with improved thermal efficiency, more energy-saving, and lower production costs.

QTG owns the independent intellectual property rights and has globally registered over 350 application patents for QIT medium. The cross-functional team consists of research scientists, professors and engineers with expertise in quantum physics, chemistry, electrochemistry, electromagnetism, thermodynamics, thermal transport, materials science and nanotechnology. QTG continuously collaborates with various established research institutes in Asia, Europe and North America. It is mainly involved in designing, research and development, application and cooperation, marketing and technology licensing. We provide innovative thermal management solutions for thermal products in the global market, and have signed cooperative contracts with over 20 internationally-renowned corporations.

Please visit our website (www.qtg.com) or drop us an email at info@qtg.com for any enquires.


量子科技集团有限公司(简称:QTG)在开曼群岛注册成立。总部设立在新加坡,在美国、德国、香港和中 国设有全资控股公司。QTG专注于等温传热技朮研究,以科技创新为宗旨,开创性地研发了量子等温传热 介质,实现了大型金属和非金属热传元件等温传热及呈现负温差传热。这项革命性的技术创新,令热工产 品大幅度的提高热效率、节省能源,减少全球二氧化碳排放,同时又降低产品的制造成本,势将推动热工 产品的更新换代。

QTG拥有独立自主的知识产权,在全球登记的量子等温传热介质应用专利逾350项。拥有包括量子物理、 量子化学、物理化学、电化学、电磁学、热力学、热传学、材料学、纳米技术的科学家、教授、博士、 工程师技术团队,合作研发机构分布于亚洲、欧洲、北美。是集创新科技、应用合作、介质销售与技术 授权为一体的国际性集团公司。现已与逾二十家国际著名工业集团签署合作文件。

Name: Translational Retinal Research Laboratory
Description:
Through multi-disciplinary collaborations with scientists from the Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR), National University of Singapore (NUS), Singapore Eye Research Institute (SERI) and clinicians from the National University Hospital (NUH), our long-term goal is to develop novel therapeutics for the treatment of retinal diseases and innovative tools to improve the outcomes of vitreo-retinal surgery. Our work is focused on two areas:

1) Biomaterials for Vitreo-retinal surgery, drug and cellular delivery
In collaboration with materials scientists, we have developed novel hydrogel materials with unique characteristics. These hydrogels are suitable for use as retinal tamponade agents in vitreo-retinal surgeries. They also have the potential of being used as sustained drug delivery systems and scaffolds for stem cell therapeutics.

2) Retinal Cellular and Gene Therapeutics
The prognosis of patients with advanced age-related macular degeneration (AMD) remain poor despite availability of anti-vascular endothelial growth factor injections. Our lab is currently developing stem cell-based therapeutics for the treatment of end-stage AMD. We are also working on RNA therapeutics for inherited retinal degeneration conditions.

This powerful solution, supported by a strategic partnership with NASDAQ-listed Ceva, allows clients to bypass critical development hurdles. It streamlines their R&D timeline by 8-10 months, reduces their overall development cycle by 30%, and saves up to $1.5 million in annual labor costs. Our ultimate goal is to make the path to market faster and more cost-effective.

Beyond our core wireless offerings, Sirius Wireless maintains dedicated expertise in high-speed interface solutions, particularly those related to SerDes technology. We offer this as an independent service line and welcome direct inquiries regarding your specialized high-bandwidth connectivity needs.

Sirius Wireless has a growing global footprint with key offices in Singapore, Taiwan and Shanghai, China. Our solutions are deployed by customers worldwide, with a presence in Europe, the United States, India, China, and Taiwan, as we continue to align our portfolio with the latest IEEE standards to meet evolving market demands.

Name: RED Micro Wire
Description:
RED Micro Wire (RMW) is a pioneer in the semiconductor industry, introducing a breakthrough technology in micro wire production that, we believe, will be adopted as the newest industry standard.

RMW has developed and is now beginning to manufacture glass coated bonding wires. RMW’s revolutionary new technology produces high quality bonding wire at lower cost than any other solution currently available on the market. 

RED Micro Wire is currently geared towards the production of glass coated copper micro wires for the semiconductor industry. The technology can be used to create wires with other types of metal cores (including Cu, Au, Ag,) and can be used in applications outside, as well as within the semiconductor industry.

RED Micro Wire is a subsidiary of RED Equipment (www.redequipment.com), a market leader in providing secondary equipment for the semiconductor industry. RED Micro Wire is a Singapore registered company uniquely positioned to serve the semiconductor market.

Funding
RMW has completed R&D phase with private funding and is currently looking for follow on investment to back go-to- market stage and further development.

Name: ZIEHL-ABEGG SEA Pte. Ltd.
Description:
About Ziehl-Abegg
 
Ziehl-Abegg (Künzelsau, Germany) is one of the leading global companies in the field of ventilation, control and drive technology. In the 1950s, Ziehl-Abegg established the basis for modern fan drives: external rotor motors which even today are still seen as state-of-the-art worldwide. Another area of business is electric motors which provide the power, for example, for elevators, medical applications (computer tomography equipment) or deep-sea underwater vehicles.
 
The high-tech company has an impressive innovative capability. Ziehl-Abegg (year 2023) employs 2,800 personnel in its production plants in southern Germany. The company has a global workforce of 5,000 spread between 17 production plants, 30 companies and 117 sales locations. The products, approx. 30,000 in all, are sold in more than 100 countries. Turnover totals 955 million euros.
 
Emil Ziehl founded the company in Berlin in 1910 as a manufacturer of electric motors. After World War II the company’s headquarters were relocated to southern Germany. Ziehl-Abegg SE is not a listed company but instead is family-owned.

For more information go to www.ziehl-abegg.com

Name: ACM Biolabs
Description:
ACM Biolabs
•	Innovative medicines through next generation targeted delivery. 
•	Versatile platform for infectious disease prevention and therapies.


We are based in two world leading innovation hubs for biotechnology: Singapore and Switzerland. Embedded in a rich ecosystem of pharmaceutical companies, biotechs, and institutional and private investors, we believe this is a valuable success factor to advance our science and pipeline programs. Our experienced team with senior ex-pharma veterans provide a basis to attract talent, partners and investors.

As a dedicated team combining pharmaceutical industry, biotech, and academic excellence we develop prophylactic treatment and therapeutic vaccines for infectious diseases and therapeutic vaccines for personalized cancer treatment based on our proprietary polymer based delivery platform technology.

We believe in challenging the status quo of targeted delivery in medicines and we are revolutionizing the new medicines with ACM platform. We develop these transformative medicines to treat or prevent diseases in a safe and well tolerable way.

_____
1.
Our delivery is targeted to antigen-presenting cells. These dendritic cells are best suited to educate the immune system in an elegant way against virus antigens. Therefore, only low amounts of payloads in ACMs are needed.

2.
ACM delivery are only made of a few components, self-assemble and encapsulate proteins, peptides, and mRNA. That means an easy manufacturing process for vast amounts of bulk product.

3.
Our payload is protected at refrigerator temperatures. We can store mRNA at 4°C making storage and transport much easier.

Name: Biolidics Limited (Formerly known as Clearbridge BioMedics)
Description:
Biolidics – Bringing clarity to cancer

Biolidics Ltd, formerly known as Clearbridge BioMedics, is a medical technology company focusing on the development of cell enrichment systems which, when combined with other analytical tests, have a wide range of applications for cancer diagnosis, prognosis, treatment selection and treatment monitoring.

Biolidics has developed patented technology and solutions with the potential to serve as a platform technology for the diagnosis, prognosis, treatment selection and treatment monitoring of various types of cancers.

The ClearCell FX1 System by Biolidics is a fully automated CE-IVD medical device which relies on a novel patented technology to separate and enrich cancer cells from blood. This allows users of the system to perform liquid biopsies to test for the presence of cancer cells (specifically circulating tumour cells, or CTCs) in blood samples or perform further analysis on cancer cells, providing a simple and minimally invasive alternative to tissue biopsies, which involve the surgical removal of tissue from a patient's body. 

Our patented award-winning microfluidic technologies have many applications throughout the various stages of a patient's cancer journey, from cancer screening and staging to personalised treatment, and post-cancer monitoring.

The ClearCell FX1 System has been installed in academic and research institutes, hospitals and laboratories across the world, including Singapore, China, Hong Kong, Japan, the US and certain EU countries.

Biolidics is a spin-off from the National University of Singapore (NUS) / SMART MIT and is the first incubatee of Clearbridge Accelerator, a high-technology incubator backed by the Singapore Government’s National Research Foundation (NRF).

For more information, please visit www.biolidics.com.

With nucleus plantations and the outgrower program, JOil ensures a continuous, non-food source supply of Jatropha for the bio-economy.
The company strives to mitigate carbon footprint and positively impact the livelihoods of communities through a scientific approach to establishing a Jatropha value chain – from cultivation to downstream applications. The company has established plantations in Ghana, Africa using regenerative agriculture on degraded land with pioneering high-yield Jatropha seeds.
 
JOil addresses very relevant problems facing people and the planet through a pioneering Jatropha value chain and is present in regions with poor capacity and infrastructure.
Climate change –  Jatropha plantations remove carbon. Jatropha plants, stem and roots sequester carbon for 30 years.
Land use & productivity – Jatropha grows on degraded lands and the cultivation of the plant is considered as reforestation. Jatropha is a non-edible feedstock for bio-substitutes and does not disrupt the food chain.
Income generation – JOil provides a reliable source of income through employment opportunities for communities in the plantations.
Safe and green products – The application of Jatropha for bio substitutes is eco-friendly and uses fewer raw materials in the by-products. Jatropha as feedstock for sustainable aviation fuel helps meet net zero emission targets.

Name: Performance Rotors Pte Ltd
Description:
Performance Rotors (PR), operating in the Republic of Singapore, Malaysia and the Kingdom of Netherlands, provides inspection services, specialising in operations within dangerous confined space environments.

A team made up of Robotics Engineers, Professional American Petroleum Institute (API) Inspectors, Industrial Rope Access Trade Association (IRATA) qualified Rope Access Technicians, who are all Drone Pilots licensed by the Civil Aviation Authority of Singapore (CAAS), PR conducts inspections primarily, using her proprietary Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), a.k.a. drones, removing the need for Inspectors to risk life and limb, entering confined spaces or working at height. 

PR’s drone solution, successfully allows safe navigation and control, in dark spaces, without magnetic compass heading information and global positioning data.

Besides acquiring accurate visual inspection data in difficult environments, PR drones, are the smallest smart drones, available today (as far as we know), to be able to:

1.	protect workers, by assessing the four main gases; Oxygen (O2), which can cause flash fire, Carbon Monoxide (CO), a silent killer, Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S), Methane (CH4), or other combustible gases and raising  the alarm to evacuate, if safety thresholds are exceeded,

2.	conduct Non-destructive Testing, allowing Inspectors to determine the integrity of metallic structures, through Ultrasonic Thickness Measurements.

3.	acquire digital data, to create a digital twin of physical assets, for maintenance, alteration planning, baseline comparison, ease of data access by all stakeholders.  

Performance Rotors’ solutions, from technical capability to procedural practices, have helped her clients improve inspection efficiency, by reducing downtime, cost and risk by up to 80%, or more. 

A Cape Class, 9-holds, cargo vessel, can be inspected, at anchorage within 2 days, instead of 14. A 25m diameter storage tank on land, can be inspected in a day, instead of 2 weeks.

If you are

The demand for circular packaging is growing thanks to new regulations. 

Aegis Packaging offers O₂X barrier coating with the highest-level barrier performances developed after years of research and studies. 

It can be applied onto plastic film and paper through rotogravure application and drastically improve the barrier properties of the packaging material without compromising on functionality or appearance.

O₂X is a non-toxic water-based transparent liquid barrier coating. With no volatile solvents in the formulation, users have the freedom to use it with different types of material to create flexible packaging according to their needs.

O₂X has been successfully applied on different materials such as PE, OPP and PET. The application is a simple process and can be done using a dry laminator. Corona or other special surface treatment may be required based on the different substrates.

Description:
Agito Akribis is an company based on many years of experience designing high performance motion control products and systems. Agito (Agito means "to put in motion" in Latin) main activity is development and sales of motion control products (controllers, amplifiers, drives, integrated controls, I/O modules and more). Agito supports its customers during the entire development process of the product or machine. To support industrial machinery performance demands, Agito developed a distributed control fieldbus known as Central-i. Central-i is an innovative, patented topology for motion control systems. At the center of a Central-i system, there is a multi-axes master controller and remote amplifiers. From the design stage to the serial production. The involvement and responsibility of the company start when the control system is defined, and continue through selecting the various system components, simulations if needed, system assembly, tuning, programming, testing, documentation and support during serial production.
Agito is part of Akribis Systems. Akribis Systems is a global designer and manufacturer of direct drive motors, stages, positioning systems and precision components for a wide range of industries. Akribis continually innovate and develop cutting-edge products that keep manufacturing, testing and inspection systems productive and reliable. Whether you need a standard or custom product, our experts are ready to solve your motion control challenges. 
More than simply a manufacturer, Akribis are also innovators. Our deep knowledge of engineering and dedication to the work has resulted in 44 patents, and our research and development into the field of magnetics will only continue to grow our business. Our engineers are able to custom design controls, motors and stages to your specific requirements with you as a co-developer.
Today, we have two production factories and numerous sales and support offices across the globe.

•	Metal: DMLS, Hybrid Metal Printing, Metal CNC Machining

4) Smart Meter and Metering Solutions

Name: AERZEN Asia Pacific
Description:
AERZEN. Compression - the key to our success.

AERZEN was founded in 1864 as Aerzener Maschinenfabrik. In 1868, we built Europe’s first positive displacement blower. The first turbo blowers followed in 1911, the first screw compressors in 1943, and in 2010 the world’s first rotary lobe compressor package. Innovations made by AERZEN keep driving forward the development of compressor technology. 

Today, AERZEN is among the world’s longest established and most significant manufacturers of positive displacement blowers, rotary lobe compressors, screw compressors and turbo blowers. AERZEN is among the undisputed market leaders in many areas of application.

At our 50 subsidiaries around the world, over 2,500 experienced employees are working hard to shape the future of compression technology. Their technological expertise, our international network of experts, and constant feedback we get from our customers provide the basis for our success.

AERZEN products and services set the standard in terms of reliability, stability of value and efficiency. Go ahead - challenge us. Expect Performance!

Name: TRIA Solutions
Description:
TRIA is an award-winning company for sustainable and innovative foodware solutions, with a firm commitment to reduce reliance on fossil-based plastics while promoting the use of nature-based renewables. One of TRIA’s goals is to enable the circularity of single-use foodware, which is largely still being sent to landfills and incinerators today. 

The company has built a reputation for its clever use of designs to drive sustainability, such as the takeaway box for Crave Nasi Lemak, and most recently the carrier system for pizza boxes with Canadian Pizza. These efforts has helped shift foodservice brands away from reliance of plastic usage. TRIA believes design has the ability to create involvement and inspire change.

TRIA's closed-loop solution for foodware is an end-to-end system that supplies and collects single-use foodware for recycling. It emulates nature's system of continuous resource renewal, made possible by the integration of its patented advanced technologies. TRIA’s solution utilizes plant-derived materials and microbial biodegradation to allow both foodware and food waste to be recycled together in a single stream which eliminates the need for source segregation - an industry first. This solution is currently being piloted by leading food service providers, such as KFC and SATS.

TRIA has been featured in over 100 global media channels in recent years, and has received numerous awards, including the Emerging Enterprise Award and the ASEAN-Korea Excellent Design Award. The company's CEO, Ng Pei Kang, has been honored with a place on Eco-Business's A-list for Sustainability Leadership and serves as a juror for the Singapore Good Design Award for sustainable solutions.

TRIA is headquartered in Singapore and is supported by venture capital funds with a mandate to enable circular food systems and reduce carbon emissions to combat the impacts of climate change.

Our portfolio of solutions is designed to address all hard-to-manage plastic streams, making it a viable option for existing operations and those who want to start tackling waste from the ground up.

We have developed cost-effective technologies that can be applied to various contexts, volumes, feedstock streams, and operators. With 14 social franchise factories already in operation or installed across South Asia and Africa, we are not just talking about it - we are doing it.

Our social franchise model empowers local entrepreneurs or organizations while removing unusable waste from the environment. We operate across the entire value chain and build collection schemes through our network, including collectors for feedstock securitization. Our social initiative, "The Collector Network," empowers local, informal waste collectors, mainly women, by providing training, access to healthcare, recognition from the government, livelihood improvement through more effective collection, and other support services.

We are continuing to extend our solution portfolio to process various waste streams, including from the aquaculture industry, turning used pond liners back into recycled granulate and other value-added products. Moreover, we are able to support various businesses with the collection of materials specifically to comply with EPR and plastic credit schemes. Name: Barrier Lubrication Technology Pte Ltd
Description:
About Us

Barrier Lubrication Technology Private Limited (BLT) is the distributor for Advanced Lubrication Technology Inc (ALT). Barrier Lubrication Technology was formed in 2016 to address the needs of wider international markets directly.

Headquartered in Singapore, we operate a distribution, consultation and sales network for the award winning unique technology Boron-CLS-Bond and the associated brands that carry it, MotorSilk and LubriSilk.

BLT works closely with ALT’s principal chemists to find the best applications of the Boron-CLS-Bond technology to provide solutions to our clients unique problems, and where required to customize and innovate with new blends and products for specialized treatments.

About Boron-CLS-Bond

Boron-CLS-Bond is a patented biodegradable lubrication technology designed for the latest mechanical advances in precision engineering. The technology platform was originally discovered and patented by the U.S. Department of Energy’s Argonne National Laboratory of Argonne, Illinois, operated by the University of Chicago, as part of the NASA program. In 1991 it was awarded the prestigious R&D 100 award for top discovery by Argonne Labs, and again in 1996 for top new product with the Boron-CLS-Bond technology.

Carbon Credits and Reduction of Emissions

In 2011, Kansas City Regional Clean Cities verified that MotorSilk Engine Treatment is ISO 14064 process conformant and complies with international standards to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, qualifying for the GHG Clean Projects Registry and lending eligibility to users for international Carbon Credits.

Fuel savings and emission reductions are based upon specifications determined by the Canadian Standards Association (www.csagroup.org) certified validator for MotorSilk ISO 14094-2 mobile emission reduction and removal project.  MotorSilk has been entered on the CSA “Clean Projects Registry”.

These lenses are intended to provide visual freedom for patients, lessening or eliminating the reliance on glasses or contact lenses. All of these lenses are foldable, which permits the surgeon to insert them through a small incision. STAAR's lens used in refractive surgery is called an Implantable Collamer Lens or "ICL". Over 1,00,000 Visian ICLs have been implanted to date.

It also provides minimally invasive intraocular lenses (IOLs), including foldable IOLs for use in minimally invasive cataract surgical procedures; aspheric IOLs that produce a clearer image than traditional spherical lenses; nanoFLEX IOL, a single piece Collamer aspheric optic; and Toric IOLs for cataract patients, as well as preloaded injectors for use in cataract surgery. In addition, the company sells surgical products, and other related instruments and devices, as well as injector parts; and manufactures AquaFlow devices for the treatment of glaucoma. It markets its products to health care providers, including surgical centers, hospitals, managed care providers, health organizations, group purchasing organizations, and government facilities primarily under the STAAR, Visian, Collamer, CentraFLOW, AquaPORT, nanoFLEX, nanoPOINT, Epiphany, and AquaFlow trademarks. The company sells products directly through its sales representatives and independent distributors in more than 75 countries. STAAR Surgical Company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Lake Forest, California. Its manufacturing plant is located in Monrovia, CA.

Name: Super Dry Pte. Ltd
Description:
Super Dry is the world leading supplier of desiccants and moisture damage prevention solutions. Super Dry products are widely used in the worlds major manufacturing industries during ocean transport. Super Dry was established in 2000 by professionals with experience in manufacturing, ocean transport and surveying. Since 2012, we have three factories, one R&D center and over 40 offices worldwide. Our R&D center is the most advanced of its kind in the world utilizing the most sophisticated equipment and testing technology to ensure our products are the safest and effective available. 

Unlike other drying agents like clay or silica gel, our products actually ABSORBS AND RETAINS moisture. . When conditions inside the sealed container change during transit these materials release the moisture back into the closed environment. This released moisture can easily exceed a gallon. Additionally, the moisture can be attracted and released many times compounding the chances for additional mold and moisture damage. 

Our Calcium chloride based products chemically change to a saline gel solution when exposed to moisture. The non-toxic chemical is wrapped in two mono-permeable (moisture in, not out) bags which can absorb nearly 400% of their weight in retained moisture. The bags are double-sealed and will not leak. Because of the super absorbency of Super Dry desiccant much less is required for maximum effectiveness 

There are no limits to the number of products that have received Super Dry protection during their transportation around the world, they include furniture, garments, footwear, bags, handicrafts, electrical goods, toys, machinery, auto parts, metals, metal products, agriculture products, pharmaceuticals, etc. 
Our goal is to supply our clients with the most efficient and cost effective solutions in the continuing battle to eliminate moisture damage.

Name: BluMaiden Biosciences
Description:
BluMaiden Biosciences is a biotech therapeutics platform company with the goal of revealing chemical dark matter to generate new medicines. 

BluMaiden is uncovering the body’s uncharted chemical landscape — a vast repertoire of natural product small molecules hidden within human biology. We believe these human-derived natural products represent one of the most promising sources for the next generation of therapeutics — safer, more effective, and inherently aligned with our biology.

Unlike synthetic compounds, human natural product–derived molecules have been refined by evolution for stability, specificity, and biocompatibility — giving us a unique advantage in discovering therapies that are both potent and safe. BluMaiden is unlocking this hidden reservoir of bioactive chemistry through advanced AI-guided discovery and computational chemistry, translating this “chemical dark matter” into entirely new classes of medicines.

Our innovative silicon solutions facilitate seamless interaction with cutting-edge connectivity technologies. Our mission is to provide engineers with sophisticated yet user-friendly platforms that streamline electronic design processes.

Our product lineup features speed-optimised MCUs designed for high-speed interface bridging tasks. Equipped with advanced features like parallel camera input, Ethernet interfaces, CAN bus, and USB2.0 ports, our MCUs offer good interconnectivity and data transfer rates. Ideal for applications requiring superior system processing performance, our MCUs enhance operational efficiency and minimise peripheral component requirements.

Patients or subscribers can use YHY’s devices, or receive treatments, remotely in the comfort of their homes. The Group’s R&D activities are carried out in Taiwan while production is outsourced to OEMs in China and Taiwan, but YHY intends to establish its own assembly plant as part of the medium-term growth plan.  

The core and revolutionary products of YHY are all non-invasive and can be broadly categorised into Fertility and Wellness Monitoring. 

The complete suite of YHY’s healthcare devices, with their respective mobile phone apps, covers the entire human life cycle, from pre-conception to the golden years, and are focused on tackling major healthcare and social issues, including infertility, obesity, chronic diseases and ageing.

Description:
Achieve new levels of productivity with wireless sharing and instant connectivity.

VisionShare A40 is the "World's First Wireless True 4K Presentation and Collaboration system" that enables any meeting participant to instantly share content wirelessly with high performance and security.

Secure: 
Keep your IT people stress-free with VisionShare.  It operates over HDMI which means no software installations are needed like with other USB-based systems.

Zero Wifi Frequency Interference:
VisionShare is a 60 GHz point-to-point wireless solution.  This means it avoids the traffic jams on the typical 2.4GHz and 5GHz frequencies.

Perfect Video without any Latency:
Have you ever given a presentation and see a delay from what is on your computer to the display?  On VisionShare, your computer and the display are in sync.  VisionShare is a pure HDMI system and transmits true 4K/UHD with zero latency.  Our competitors have USB interfaces that compress and decompress data and typically is seen as delays of 70~100 ms from your computer to the display.

If you want to know more about VisionShare, contact us at our website.  We respond quickly!

Name: Better Air Singapore
Description:
According to the World Health Organization and the Center for Disease Control, our indoor space is substantially more polluted than the outdoors. And, the indoor pollution is mostly concentrated on surfaces and objects, Gravity pulls down everything including the tiniest elements. Therefore, the pollution in the air rapidly descends onto the surfaces below. The result is that, on average, surfaces and objects hold more than 5x the amount of pollution than that of the air. living micro-organism such as mold and bacteria depend on contaminated surfaces/objects to provide for their food as it may be only consumed when everybody is on solid objects. Therefore, abundance of pathogens find refuge on surfaces and objects where they continue to prosper and grow.  The outcome is that physical contact with surfaces and objects is responsible for more than 80% of infectious disease transmissions.
None of the air purifiers in the market today, offer a safe and efficient solution; The method of a filtering device is to sack air into a cleaning chamber where it is treated by UV light beams or a physical barrier such as an active filter, that is well designed, may block a substantial portion of the particles in the air. But, none of these air filtering technologies are good with cleaning the surfaces and objects; therefore, the purification of indoors space with air purifiers is mediocre at best and inadequate since the majority of bacteria, mold, viruses and allergens are not removed.

Trimax Machinery was founded in Singapore in 2009 with a simple aim to provide “Simply Better Crushers” for rock and mineral processing. Since then, Trimax Machinery has become an engineering company committed to supplying a broad spectrum of efficient rock and mineral processing machinery to our customers that yield superior productivity and return on investment. The common fundamental foundation of all our machinery is superior efficiency and durability incorporated into their design.

However, by continuously building our brand and intensifying our global marketing communication efforts to the rest of the world, we are making significant inroads in expanding our global reach through regional distributors.

Key to our success is an unwavering commitment to quality throughout every aspect of our business. Trimax Machinery works with qualified suppliers that can ensure that our products are amongst the best-in-class in terms of stringent and consistent quality. Trimax Machinery is headquartered in Singapore and operates an assembly plant in Johor, Malaysia, where parts undergo another round of inspection prior to assembly. Last but not least, assembled crushers are tested prior to final delivery to customers.  

After-sales service includes us maintaining a minimum stock level of all spare parts for our machinery, machinery operators attending an user training program at one of our assembly plants, as well as a service maintenance program whereby regular on-site visits are made by our Service Engineers to check on the condition of the machinery whilst in operation. Therefore, no matter where our machinery is installed in any part of the world, they are supported by a world-class premium parts and service organization to ensure optimum product reliability, availability and customer support.

Name: Voyar
Description:
The Voyar FROG walker provides children with Cerebral Palsy and similar conditions better support, mobility and autonomy.

FROG addresses fatigue and eliminates the need for frequent assisted transfers when using conventional gait trainers by incorporating a resting seat. Children with CP can easily transition to rest without leaving their walker.

An integrated, patented weight-compensation mechanism enables self-initiated postural changes between sitting and standing without undue effort. Conventional gait trainers do not have a resting position/seat which can be activated by the child autonomously.

FROG integrates a novel adjustable lift seat that utilises a weight compensation and transition mechanism. When seated, the compensation mechanism exercises a counter force against the weight of the child, thus assisting the child in standing up.

The mechanism applies just enough force to fold the lift seat up and allow space for ambulation while providing easy access for the next deployment. When the child sits from the standing position, this feature also helps to stabilize in transition.

FROG also provides several other innovative features such as independently adjustable caster wheels for directional control, anti-reverse wheels bearings and a wide range of size adjustments for the walker to grow with the child.

Name: Skainom Pte Ltd
Description:
Yes, it is a now possible. The implementation of an affordable, convenient 
and comfortable eye screening system that allows every country to screen every single adult.
The use of non- pupil dilation fundus cameras, able to capture and transfer wirelessly eye images. These fundus cameras will be deployed in population clusters within cities in peripheral or outlying areas. 

All the transferred eyes images are remotely graded by a portal embedded with Skainom Artificial Intelligence deep learning software to automatically detect normal eyes (without symptoms of Diabetic Retinopathy, Glaucoma, Cataract and Age Related Macular Degeneration)

The Skainom Artificial Intelligence will then categorize all eye screening results into 2 groups.

Green And Red

(A)	Normal eyes not needing to see an Ophthalmologist immediately.
        Color Code: Green
        Symbol: (-) 

(B)	Not Normal eyes is a cohort of pathological findings of symptoms in eye images of Diabetic 
        Retinopathy, Age Related Macular Degeneration, Cataract and Glaucoma. Patient diagnosed with these 
        4 symptoms will be recommended to see an ophthalmologist immediately.
        Color Code: Red 
        Symbol: (+) 

This single code color and symbol, in many countries will transcend language barriers and will inform the patients whether they are required to see an ophthalmologist for a treatment. 
If symptoms of the 4 major causes of preventable blindness are detected early, a day will come when avoidable blindness is eradicated. 

Skainom has filed out two inventions to introduce these systems to the world. Even with the shortage of ophthalmologists, eye medical resources can be optimised in every single country.
The Skainom team is led by Dr Richard Fan, a practising ophthalmologist in Singapore and his team SK Ong, Barbara Ong, Nie Wenwei, Hendra Yasin, Bhavani.

Name: Eximmium Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Eximmium is a pioneering clinical-stage biotech company based in Singapore and Munich, advancing first-in-class cancer immunotherapies that target externalized intracellular neoantigens.
Eximmium discovers and develops first-in-class (FIC) antibodies targeting intracellular proteins that are abnormally externalized on the surface of cancer cells—yet absent from normal cell membranes. This novel approach addresses the limitations of conventional immunotherapies, which often target membrane receptors or transport proteins and suffer from off-tumor toxicity and narrow therapeutic windows.
By achieving high tumor specificity and broad druggability, Eximmium’s platform supports multiple therapeutic modalities, including TCEs, ADCs, CAR-T, and RIT, with broad applicability across solid tumors.
The lead target has been clinically validated through CAR-T therapy for both efficacy and safety, and the corresponding ADC product candidates have demonstrated outstanding preclinical efficacy and safety in models of tumors (e.g. SCLC and PDAC CDX).
Backed by comprehensive validation and strong proprietary IP covering the targets, antibodies, and therapeutic applications, Eximmium is well-positioned for development and commercialization partnerships.

The ultimate holding company of iPtec and Sys-Mac is Zicom Group Limited, a diversified engineering group listed on the Australian Stock Exchange.

We have been granted Private Sector Translator status by SPRING in recognition of our all-round engineering and manufacturing capabilities.

Name: UniCarriers Forklift Trucks Asia Pacific
Description: UniCarriers has been supplied from the production bases in Japan, U.S., China, Thailand, Spain, Sweden and Finland. At all locations, products have been strictly checked to assure quality before delivering to our sales networks in the global markets covering each continent in the world. Our sales networks have professional engineers to provide quality service to support your operation on the move.

Name: Infantron Magnetics Pvt Ltd
Description:
Coil Winding Machine, Cores and Wires.

Infantron (S) Pte. Ltd. provides consulting and services to clients globally as partners to our core business which include manufacturing and distribution of magnetic products, winding machines used in electrical/electronics industry.

Name: Akatsuki Pte Ltd
Description:
Akatsuki Pte Ltd started out from a mere three staffs, one customer and an old blister pack machine. With limited resources, we push on with determination even though it was an extremely tough time. Without even a proper company signboard to start with, business carried on as usual and stocks were delivered to our customer with no delays or errors. Slowly but surely, we began to see more customers and business started picking up progressively with the help of referrals from our clients. We see the need for more staffs, bigger space and newer equipments. Most importantly, we see the steady growth and make of a successful company.

Over the years, Akatsuki has diversified into different industry and has performed superbly in their own arena. From packaging service, we moved into inkjet media and ink supplies, followed by machines and accessories and also large format printing and display systems. In each business unit, our goals are simple and straight-forward, that is to put in hundred percent passion and sincerity in everything we do. Each entity endeavor to constantly gain knowledge and to improve, and dare to venture into the role of a ‘total solutions provider’ so as to provide all rounded support to our customers as a value added service. Looking back at the past 16 years, Akatsuki has been successfully achieving the company’s goals and courageously undertake many new projects and business opportunities and this is not going to stop. Akatsuki will consistently look into new opportunities to expand our businesses where it can benefit our company, our employees and our society.

Name: CHUANG AIK MACHINERY & ENGINEERING PTE LTD
Description:
Chuang Aik Engineering Works was established on 17th August 1983 in the field of precision mechanical engineering and has its Engineering and Machining workshop registered in Singapore. Subsequently in 2009, our company began operation under Chuang Aik Machinery & Engineering Pte Ltd and diversified into specialising Conventional/CNC Milling/Boring/Drilling, Pipe Machining Works etc.

We specialise in the supply of high quality machining works for Oilfield, Ship Building, Onshore & Offshore, Marine Industries and more. We pride ourselves in providing comprehensive and reliable services to our customers. We provide solutions in any difficult supply problems faced during fabrication and ensure on time delivery.

Our talented and experienced team are well trained and knowledgeable in stainless/mild/carbon steel, other metals and even non-metal products. We always fulfil customers’ needs and their most complex and original machining requirements.

In order to ensure the quality of our products and services, we always seek to upgrade and improve on our facilities and services to meet customers’ requirements and expectations at all times. Since 2016, our company has been in compliance to ISO 9001:2015 covering the scope of Engineering Works & Machining Services (CNC Turning & Milling). In the same year, we extended the scope coverage of Manufacturing of Metal Fabrication Parts & Machining Services (Conventional & CNC Turning & Milling).

Name: Asia Engineering Pvt Ltd
Description: Asia Engineering & Outsourcing Pte Ltd is a Singapore based company established in early 2007, started by young entrepreneurs with an objective to serve & provide Solution for Engineering needs towards local demands for CNC machining with many years of experience in Engineering field specializing in manufacturing and customized metal fabrication for Industries such as Oil & Gas, Marine Aerospace, Automation, Automotive, Manufacturing and Semi-Conductor/Electronics and all kind type of High pressure fittings, fabrication, Pipe works.

Name: Assun Motor
Description:
Assun Motor is manufacturer of precise DC driving systems and motion control solutions. Inspired by innovation and precision, Assun has developed their product range to be top-class in the world.
Products provided by Assun include DC Brushless/Brushed Coreless Motors,  Servo Motors, Gearheads, Motor Controllers & Drivers, Encoders and Brakes. All products are designed for performance critical appliances which require highest precision, efficiency, reliability and power density.
With factory and office in Shenzhen China, regional office in Singapore, USA, and sales agents in Europe and Australia, Assun Motor has built the global sales/services network to support customers worldwide. 
Assun Motor is always willing to be dedicated in developing new engineering technologies and most optimized solutions to serve the clients from all different industries to their best satisfaction.

Name: UNILIB
Description:
UNILIB MISSION
To be a market leader for the Diesel & Gas Engine Power Plant design and solutions, manufacturing of systems which meet client's specifications and expectations with quality commitment. To establish and develop future power generation for a greener and safer better environment. With our commitment, we continue to create a safe working and pleasant environment, caring for our employees with continuous upgrading.
 
COMPANY'S PROFILE
Unilib has since been established in 1982. We have been dedicated to provide a wide range of efficient and reliable products. All our products are backed up by our comprehensive after sales service programs and customer supports. We are committed to the highest total quality management that applies to a full range of manufacturing and design solutions and exceeds customers' expectations. This commitment also includes rigorous quality control implemented at every state of production and the very best in service.

Since we began in 1982, Unilib has adhered to a "customer centric" philosophy that puts the customer first and delivers what each defines as value. Today, Unilib  provides a complete end-to-end manufacturing services to companies of all sizes, geographic locations and end markets.

QUALITY CONTROL
Unilib has high standards for quality. We have a rigorous quality control system in place to test products at every stage, from raw materials to the finished products. All materials coming into our facility are thus installed into our finished products and undergo stringent tests to ensure they are the highest quality. Any materials that don't meet our standards are rejected and immediately sent back to our dealers.

QUALITY ASSURANCE
Our QA covers all activities from design, development, production, installation, servicing to documentation. It introduced the sayings "fit for purpose" and "do it right the first time".

Name: OEP Singapore
Description:
Orient EuroPharma Singapore (OEP SG) was established in 1993, with an emphasis on products for prescription drugs and nutritional market. The company showed advantages in oncology, urology, neuroscience, and basic medicine. OEP SG markets products including Navelbine (in injection and capsule form) for non-small cell lung cancer and breast carcinoma; anti-parkinson's disease drug; and Pamorelin for prostatic cancer.

In 2018, the Wealth Magazine in Taiwan announced the Top 100 Taiwanese Business in ASEAN. The subsidiary in Singapore was ranked 88th in the 2015 and 2016 Top 100 Taiwanese Business in ASEAN for revenue and profit growth, and its business results have been recognized by external communities.

Name: Seng Cheong Tin Fty Pte Ltd
Description:
Seng Cheong Tin Factory was set up in 1980 and has now become one of the most established manufacturers of general tin cans in Singapore. We call ourselves the supermarket of tin cans as we have one of the widest product range in terms of sizes, capacities, dimensions and packaging usages. Capacities range from 100cc to 25 litres. Our cans are exported all over the world.

Our factories standing on more than 120,000 square feet of land area houses our printing and production lines capable of producing all the requirements of can manufacturing. From printing to production of closures, handles, can components, moulds and tools, we have the knowledge and expertise to make standard size cans and also to custom make any types of cans to our customer’s requirements.

Our plastic injection division also has the capacity to make plastic pails ranging from 5 litres to 20 litres.

Through close relationships and collaboration with our suppliers, we have the best resources to manufacture affordable and high quality cans based on our Motto of Quality, Service and Dependability.

Name: UHP Gas-Sys Technology Pte Ltd
Description: UHP Gas systems Singapore is Global Gas box R & D Headquarters providing technology and manufacturing solutions for Semiconductor Equipment Manufacturing Companies for Deposition, Etch, Clean processes.

Name: Fristdo Electronic Pte Ltd
Description:
Fristdo Electronics Singapore Pte. Ltd. is a worldwide progressive electronic components and parts distributor awarded ISO9001 Quality Management System Certificate.

Fristdo is concentrating on the electrical and electronic components for the communication, medical facilities, industrial control, automotive electronics, aviation, military industrial, circuit board, and consumer electronics industries.

Name: Progressive Systems & Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
Progressive Systems & Engineering Pte Ltd is an established System Integrator for final flow control requirements, designing valve & automation solutions for reputable multinational clients since 1995. 

Sustainable Solutions. Reliable Services. Unwavering commitment we have kept to our customers since 1995.
 
Over the years, Progressive Systems & Engineering Pte Ltd has established a strong reputation for itself as a specialist in final flow control solutions.

Our strength lies in the ability to understand each customer's unique requirement and tailor a solution based on our strong understanding of cross integration dynamics between different brand's solutions.

The outcome is a sustainable solution in accordance with customer's unique preferences which achieve optimal balance between performance & cost.

Building upon our history of serving primarily the Marine & Offshore industry, today Progressive Systems & Engineering covers a wider spectrum of industries which includes :
1. Marine & Offshore
2. Oil & Gas
3. Chemical
4. Petrochemical Industry

In 2015, Progressive Systems & Engineering moved from its old premises at Eunos Avenue to the new office & warehouse space at Enterprise One with approximately 10,000 sq-ft.

Reputable brands we incorporate into our engineering solutions include:
    - Bray (Bray, Flowtek, RitePro, Vaas) 
    - Emerson (Bettis, Damcos, Topworx etc.) 
    - Pentair (Westlock Controls)
    - IMI Engineering (Norgren)
    - Rotork

2. Email : sales@psepl.com.sg

Name: SEATOBAG
Description:
SEATOBAG, established in 2018, is a Singapore Aqua Biotech company motivated to making a positive difference with our biotech innovation and development for a sustainable, robust and resilient food ecosystem to bring environmental, health, social and economic benefits for global economies through the growth and productivity of nature-positive foods. 

SEATOBAG focus our research and innovations in understanding the Mangrove Microbial Ecosystem and explore the potential of microbial diversity for its applications in aquaculture. 

Believing in the beneficial properties of postbiotics are effective for marine life, SEATOBAG Science Team centres on the Mangrove Microbial Ecosystem to select microbes for culturing our proprietary postbiotics – biocrobeX postbiotic for aquaculture farming.

With our proprietary biocrobeX postbiotic, SEATOBAG fundamentally expanded our development of sustainable aquaculture farming applications – Miiiome Aqua Feed (Fermented) to improve aquaculture farming's productivity and yield performance with consistent harvest of quality Blue Food. Using our very own Miiiome Aqua Feed (Fermented) we have been enabled to sustainably farm LACTOSEAFOOD, the healthier fish with postbiotic that tastes truly better.

Through our development of the next generation of aqua feeds, we enable food producers to harvest  food fish sustainably and responsibly with consistency in quantity and nutritional quality, addressing prevailing food security and safety challenges faced globally.

Name: Lion Asiapac Ltd
Description: Lion Asiapac Limited is a public company listed on the main board of Singapore Exchange. The principal activities of the Company and its subsidiaries are lime manufacturing, trading of steel consumables and investment holding. The Company's segments include Manufacturing of lime, Trading of steel consumables and Investment holding/others. Its Manufacturing of lime segment includes manufacturing and sales of quicklime, hydrated lime and quicklime powder. Its Trading of steel consumables segment includes trading of consumables required for steel product manufacturing. Its Investment holding/others segment is engaged in managing investments. The Company operates through its subsidiaries, which include Compact Energy Sdn. Bhd., LAP Trading (Shanghai) Co., Ltd and LAP Marshall Pte Ltd.

Name: Anz Electric Pte Ltd.
Description:
We offer customized turnkey design and manufacturing solution services for customers who want their products to be quality and unique.
Anz Electric has a well-trained R&D team with qualified personnel. The hardware covers MCU, DSP schematic and PCB layout. The firmware covers embedded system design. The mechanical engineers create the industrial enclosure.

Name: EVERFEED TECHNOLOGY PTE LTD
Description: EVERFEED TECHNOLOGY PTE LTD is an electrical/electronic manufacturing company based out of 2 Tuas Link 1 Jurong Industrial Estate, Singapore, Singapore.

Name: Apismoon Electric Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Apsimoon is a manufacturer of high-end power distribution products. Relying on the cooperation with Chinese factories, Apsimoon will establish the world's industry-leading intelligent solutions, form a competitive product line.

Apsimoon cooperative factory is the leader of power distribution products in mainland China. The company is positioned as a manufacturer of key digital infrastructure products, providing customers with key digital energy products from "grid to chip" (network energy products, communication site energy products) and product life cycle service assurance. The main business covers power management products, thermal energy management products, information technology and edge computing facilities products, intelligent software management products and product life cycle services. To provide high-quality products and services to customers from data center infrastructure, smart city, 5G, digital transportation, digital manufacturing and other fields.

At present, mainland factory has the highest level factory with the strongest scientific and technological capability, the high degree of automation and the strict product quality in the field of PDU and busway. Meanwhile, it has a strong r&d team, which can develop and customize new products for high standard users.

Name: Kemia Pte Ltd
Description:
Based in Singapore, Kemia (晶雅私人有限公司) is a manufacturer of custom-formulated specialty chemicals for surface finishing in Asia that leverages over 50 years of technical expertise, experience and cutting-edge research & development.

Since 2000, Kemia has manufactured speciality chemicals for plating applications for electronic components, automotive parts, household appliances, hardware, tools and other industrial equipment.

Through our network of distributors across Asia, Kemia has successfully provided chemicals for surface finishing for more than 200 companies in Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan and Korea.

As an ISO 9001-certified enterprise, Kemia is committed to providing world-class products and exceptional customer service to our clients. We work closely with clients to understand their needs and fulfil the technical specifications for their surface finishing solutions.

Our surface finishing products are matched with our extensive experience and high technical expertise to ensure that we continue to be a leading speciality chemicals supplier and manufacturer for the metal finishing industries in Asia.
